programme.desc: Citizen Khan star Adil Ray hosts an extended edition of the satirical quiz, with comedian Kiri Pritchard-McLean and Conservative MP Nicky Morgan joining team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at the week's events

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Dan Walker and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Rip Off Britain
programme.desc: A report on the people fighting back against thieves stealing their mail and their identities. Plus, the parents facing huge phone bills racked up by their unsuspecting children

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and the team explore properties about to be auctioned in Haslington near Crewe, Maryport in Cumbria, and Derby, and discuss plans with the new owners

programme.title: Critical Incident
programme.desc: How groundbreaking research into the psychology of crowds could help prevent attacks on police. Plus, a report on a surge in coughing attacks on police officers

programme.title: Paramedics on Scene
programme.desc: Following ambulance crews in Aberdeen and Edinburgh, as paramedics respond to a major crash on the M8. Elsewhere, an elderly lady needs treatment for a facial injury

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Anita Manning is at the helm on today's Bargain Hunt, which comes from Newark antiques fair. Today's experts are Paul Laidlaw and Caroline Hawley

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Indian Doctor
programme.desc: Prem is left feeling isolated as more and more people sign up for New Trefelin. An act of sabotage breaks the village's calm, and Basil wastes no time in telling Emlyn who he thinks is to blame. Meanwhile, Sian decides that Ceri might be worth ensnaring with her feminine charms

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore how certain British ingredients make traditional combinations, preparing a pork and apple dish and a pear and Stilton tart. They also find out how Yorkshire pudding was made in the 1700s, and discover it was not originally served with beef

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Ginny Buckley heads on a house hunting mission in rural Devon for a couple who are looking for their first home together, with a budget of £525,000

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Harry and David Rich come up with plans for a tranquil garden in Newport, Wales, which must be suitable for growing herbs and practicing meditation

programme.title: The Bidding Room
programme.desc: Five dealers compete to buy items including movie posters, Scandinavian furniture and some unusual dolls' heads. Presented by Nigel Havers

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Magazine show, with stories of interest from around the UK, plus celebrity guests in the studio, presented by Alex Jones and Michael Ball

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Harry and David Rich transform a garden in Watford for a couple who long for an outdoor space to remind them of their former garden in Africa

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: The team restores a bass guitar that once topped the charts in the hands of Tony Wilson, founding member of 1970s funk legends Hot Chocolate, but has since fallen into disrepair. Other items include a vintage end-of-the-pier machine, a carved wooden plaque, and a hand-carved belt that marked an unlikely wartime friendship

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: A call comes in from London Fire Brigade requesting assistance at a fire in a block of flats which immediately puts the team under pressure. Meanwhile, mother and daughter team Nicola and Maisie have just finished with their first patient of the night but are immediately dispatched to a 12-year-old boy who has had an unfortunate accident

programme.title: Nolan Live
programme.desc: Stephen Nolan probes the issues that matter to the people of Northern Ireland, focusing on the stories of the week and the people making the headlines in lively debates with the studio audience and guest panellists

programme.title: Match of the Day from Northern Ireland
programme.desc: Norway v Northern Ireland. Stephen Watson presents action from the Group B1 match from Ullevaal Stadion, as the visitors looked to avenge a defeat in last month's reverse fixture. With analysis from Jim Magilton

programme.title: Love Life
programme.desc: When a therapist encourages her to address her fear of rejection, Darby recalls applying to boarding school to get her parents' attention in her teenage years

programme.title: Love Life
programme.desc: Darby finds herself stuck in a despondent marriage as she reconnects with someone from her past. Starring Anna Kendrick and Zoe Chao

programme.title: Love Life
programme.desc: When Darby has a medical scare, her overbearing mom, Claudia, comes to town to help. Romantic comedy anthology series, starring Anna Kendrick

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: The death of transport worker Belly Mujinga following reports she had been coughed and spat on by a customer at London's Victoria Station was described by Boris Johnson as appalling and has prompted two million people to join a Justice for Belly campaign. A police investigation wasn't launched until five weeks after the mother-of-one had died from Covid-19 and concluded there was insufficient evidence to charge anyone with a crime. Reporter Rianna Croxford goes back over the evidence and asks whether all available lines of inquiry were followed, and examines claims that Belly could have been better protected at work and hears calls for an inquest

programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Mark, Abrar, Marilyn and Lucy pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will is shocked to discover Ellis has spent the night with Dawn, but she justifies her actions, insisting to Will she had to do the one thing Billy would never forgive her for. Charity is feeling paranoid about the state of her and Vanessa's relationship, while Victoria and Luke look over the land she has inherited from Annie

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Todd puts pressure on Eileen to go ahead with his plan, while Scott tells Johnny of his plot to rip off Ray and wonders if he would like in on the action. David is horrified when he catches Shona about to take Max's medication instead of her own and realises with heavy heart that she's not safe to be left on her own

programme.title: Inside Animal A&E
programme.desc: Ambulance driver Lee picks up a cat whose excess weight is causing it some serious health problems, while vet Charlotte deals with a husky with a sore paw in the mobile clinic. In Grimsby, Bev operates on a dog that has a worrying lump in its bladder that needs removing as soon as possible

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Eileen tells a relieved Billy that it wasn't Todd's body in the mortuary and also confesses to Mary that Todd is alive and well and that she has been meeting up with him in secret. Johnny tells Scott to count him out, as his criminal days are behind him, and Ray reveals that he would like to buy the factory

programme.title: John Bishop's Great Whale Rescue
programme.desc: Part one of two. The comedian follows the journey of two beluga whales being released from captivity in an entertainment park in China and returned to the ocean. John's mission starts when he flies to Shanghai and visits the Beluga Theatre at Changfeng Park, where Little Grey and Little White have spent every day for the last 10 years performing for the crowds

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Martin Luther King by Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: To mark 50 years since the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King on April 4, 1968, Trevor McDonald travels to America's Deep South in the hope of getting closer to the man who meant so much to him and so many others. He uncovers new sides to the story, speaks to a former member of the Ku Klux Klan and interviews an expert on the horrors of lynching in 20th-century America. He also asks some of black role models, including Naomi Campbell, General Colin Powell and the Rev Al Sharpton, what Martin Luther King means to them

programme.title: Alison Hammond: Back to School
programme.desc: Alison Hammond travels across the country and back in time on an historical journey to discover some of the black figures who have been hidden from Britain's history, throwing light on their extraordinary stories and achievements

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Emma, Jim, Elisa and Bryan pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Billy angrily refuses Ellis' apology, but the pair are both equally shocked when Dawn approaches them and lies, announcing that her affair with Ellis had been going on for ages. Victoria worries about her land, while Leyla is shocked when Mandy reveals that Bernice has given them both until tomorrow to get the salon money together and that whoever gets it first, will get the lease

programme.title: Harbour Cops
programme.desc: Tenby officers are on the hunt for a suspect who Is armed with a machete in the seaside town of Saundersfoot. Meanwhile, an injured seagull needs the help of PCSOs Graham and Steph

programme.title: Craig & Danny: Funny, Black and on TV
programme.desc: As part of ITV's programming to mark Black History Month, Red Dwarf stars Craig Charles and Danny John-Jules celebrate 50 years of black British comedy legends, from trailblazers such as Charlie Williams to rising stars including Michaela Coel. Others whose work features include Sir Lenny Henry, Rising Damp's Don Warrington and Desmond's star Norman Beaton, alongside those from the new generation of comedy talent like BGT star Kojo and Stateside breakout Gina Yashere

programme.title: John Bishop's Great Whale Rescue
programme.desc: Part two of two. John's mission to return Little White and Little Grey from captivity to the Icelandic beluga whale sanctuary continues, as the pair begin the 6,000-mile journey to reach their new home. Following the previous delays in China, the release is already two months behind schedule, and as autumn approaches the whales have little time to put on enough weight and acclimatise to the cold water they will face in the bay

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Sorry, I Didn't Know
programme.desc: Russell Kane, Verona Rose, AJ Adudu and Nathan Caton join team leaders Chizzy Akudolu and Judi Love to take viewers on a tour of black British history. Hosted by Jimmy Akingbola

programme.title: The Savoy
programme.desc: Staff at the London hotel prepare for Valentine's Day, one of the busiest and most profitable nights of the year. Restaurant Director Thierry is still reeling from owner Gordon Ramsay's visit to the Grill, but he gets to work re-training his front-of-house staff and looking at how he can improve his already high standards. Downstairs in the florists, boss Belinda and junior florist MaryKate prepare £20,000 worth of flowers, which will be decorated across the hotel throughout the week

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy tries various ways to get the money together and Paul wonders how he can help, while Aaron has an altercation with Ben's friend and leaves. Marlon is shocked when Bear tells him Chas was caught flirting with Al, and Vinny is stunned by what he discovers about Liv

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: George reveals his plan to stage a mock funeral so that Mick will think Todd is dead, and the Platts prepare for Audrey's belated 80th birthday party. Tyrone is puzzled when Evelyn and Arthur return back early from the Lakes with a story full of holes, and Scott orders Johnny to meet him to talk him through his plan

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. Vietnam Airlines are battling baggage woes in the lead up to the busy holiday period, and rookie engineer Mo comes up with an ingenious solution to ensure no one is ever stranded abroad without their luggage

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Todd puts Eileen in danger when he lets himself into Number 11 and starts searching for her cash, while Gary tells Ray that the factory is not for sale. Scott tells Johnny that his job is to drive the getaway car and if he doesn't comply, he'll reveal all to Jenny, and Evelyn tells Arthur that she's sorry she ruined their trip with her sleeping arrangements

programme.title: The Savoy
programme.desc: Documentary offering a glimpse into the lives of those lucky enough to check into the glamorous London hotel, and those who serve them. Head butler Sean shows newest butler Michael the ropes about discretion and how to look after the hotel's most important guests

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Peston
programme.desc: Political magazine show presented by Robert Peston, featuring major interviews with MPs, topical guests and cultural figures. Including updates from social media taking in perspectives from viewers, experts and key players throughout the programme

programme.title: UEFA Nations League Highlights
programme.desc: Mark Pougatch presents action from the fourth round of fixtures, including England v Denmark at Wembley Stadium, Scotland v Czech Republic at Hampden Park, Bulgaria v Wales at Vasil Levski National Stadium and Norway v Northern Ireland at Ullevaal Stadion. With analysis from Roy Keane and Ian Wright and commentary by Sam Matterface, Lee Dixon, Joe Speight, Seb Hutchinson, Joshua Adu-Donkor and Tom Gayle

programme.title: James Martin's American Adventure
programme.desc: The chef heads towards Louisiana's swamplands, where he ditches his car for a high-speed boat. Then, he travels to the nearby city of Lafayette, where he visits the family run smokehouse, Johnson's Boucaniere, and samples some of their traditional homemade sausage. James also tries ice cream from the legendary Borden's ice cream parlour, before heading back to the swamps to cook one final dish

programme.desc: Alan is mortified to discover Lyndsey has entered the adult film industry, and decides to confront her about her chosen career. However, the encounter only results in the exposure of his own secrets, so Walden tries to lift his spirits by hosting a party

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.title: A Touch of Frost

programme.title: Heartbeat

Rural drama, starring William Simons, John Duttine, David Stockwell and Gwen Taylor

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gary acts as peacemaker between Judy and Joyce. Maud is thrilled that Maureen and Bill are going away together for Christmas. Sean is set upon by two thugs outside the bookies

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiona is annoyed when Tony tells her he wants to finish with Maxine. Roy turns to Deirdre for help when Alec won't leave him alone. Liz is shaken when she hears Sean was beaten up

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bell-ringers of Midsomer Wellow are mysteriously murdered one by one - and it seems an ancient rhyme may hold the key to the killer's motive. As Barnaby and Troy embark on a baffling investigation in an attempt to determine the truth, Joyce starts digging into the past to discover the assassin's motives. John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Hugh Bonneville star

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack is asked to investigate the theft of a car belonging to a friend of Mullett, but misjudges the grizzled Superintendent's capacity for tact and diplomacy and it is not long before he is taken off the case. Things take a shocking turn when the car finally turns up - with the body of a drug dealer in the boot. Detective drama, starring David Jason, with Melanie Thaw and Bruce Alexander

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective investigates when a victim of fraud is found murdered on a golf course - but his inquiries are complicated by the discovery of a tramp's mutilated body nearby. To make matters worse, beautiful singer Bella Duveen is also around, seemingly intent on helping herself to a grim souvenir. David Suchet stars, with Hugh Fraser, Bill Moody and Jacinta Mulcahy

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar return as detectives Cassie and Sunny, who find themselves thrown into another historic murder case with the discover of a body. This time it's the perfectly preserved remains of a middle-aged man found in a suitcase in the silt of a London river. As the detectives begin the complicated task of trying to identify the victim, four unconnected people go about their business - Brighton-based lawyer Colin Osborne, paediatric nurse Marion Kelsey, teacher Sara Mahmoud and respected police officer Tessa Nixon - unaware they are about to be dragged into the investigation. Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar star, with Mark Bonnar, Lorraine Ashbourne, Charlie Condou and Wendy Craig

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The death of an unpopular art dealer leaves Poirot with a long list of suspects within his tangled, squabbling family - even though his eccentric wife had predicted his end. Detective drama, starring David Suchet, with Emma Fielding, Fiona Walker and Jeremy Northam

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A gang of youths push Peggy down a hole while she's poaching. Lord Ashfordly alerts Miller, who gives chase - but lands himself in trouble when he knocks down an elderly pedestrian. However, the incident gives Peggy a new money-making idea - she'll sue for the 'injury' she sustained in the fall. Meanwhile, Gina is attracted to her handsome college tutor. Tim Brooke-Taylor and Murray Head guest star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Tony wants to know where Will has disappeared to. Sarah drags Rachel out for a night out. Terry gets jealous of Alan's relationship with Jo

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will tries to make an escape from the barn. Zoe tells Dee that Eric has been taking pig steroids. Becky calls the police about Will's disappearance

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des tries to apologise to Derek. Deirdre tells Alec he's upsetting Roy. Vera worries when money goes missing from the till. Ken is horrified when Kelly agrees to work for Denise

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Joyce apologises to the Malletts for misleading them. Ken and his solicitor meet with Denise to discuss custody of Daniel. Liz visits Steve and asks him to help put Fraser off

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A pupil at the prestigious Devington School dies of a stab wound while competing in a race in honour of his recently deceased grandfather. DCI Barnaby discovers the death could be linked to a long-running rivalry between the school and the locals - or to the youngster's membership of an elite club dedicated to dining on suet puddings. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Jane Wymark

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Dour detective Jack Frost investigates a woman's near-fatal shooting. The victim was all set to testify against a notorious drugs baron accused of murdering one of his employees, but the appearance of a contract killer makes her think again - and it appears someone on Jack's team is leaking information. Meanwhile, the station is turned upside down in the hunt for a missing lottery ticket. David Jason, Michael McKell and Bruce Alexander star

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The peace of the sleepy hamlet of Little Worthy is disturbed when a man's body is found tied down in a miniature village - just like the hero in classic tale Gulliver's Travels. As the investigation begins, Barnaby has no shortage of suspects, including the victim's recently jilted partner - a teacher whose classroom is full of paintings of the story - his teenage lover, a caretaker and a hotel owner. But the case takes a twist when the killer strikes again amid the chaos of the annual fancy-dress boat race. Detective drama, guest starring Jesse Birdsall and Olivia Colman, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: With their victim identified, Cassie and Sunny begin to find out a bit more about David Walker by talking to his ex-wife, DI Tessa Nixon, who reveals he suffered from depression. A search through the original investigation files and some numbers from David's pager help build a picture of him - and also lead to a few potential suspects. However, his son Jason struggles to deal with the news that someone murdered his dad. Whodunit, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Lorraine Ashbourne, Mark Bonnar, Douglas Hodge, Nigel Lindsay and Will Brown

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Beautiful Russian aristocrat Countess Vera Rossakoff, the chief suspect in a series of jewel thefts, seemingly captivates Poirot with her charm and intellect, meaning Hastings and Miss Lemon have to do most of the actual detective work and ensure she is brought to justice. Drama, guest starring Kika Markham

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Fiona taunts Will by telling him she spent the night with his family. Steve demands to know what Kim has been doing with the company money. Rachel tells Kathy about her and Jack

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will is confident that his dad will find him. Rachel finds Sarah in tears over Jack's behaviour. Chris attempts to blackmail Kim over the missing money

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alec plants marked £5 notes in his coat pocket at work. Samantha is interested to hear Sean has dumped Liz. Liz visits Fraser and tells him to stop hounding her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Martin wants to buy Curly's car for Gail to learn to drive in. Anne and Vera organise a party for Curly. Don is hurt when Sarah Louise tells him he's not invited for Christmas

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bodies of a glamorous senior citizen and a distinguished doctor are found beside a river - and although suspicion for their murders initially falls on poachers, Barnaby suspects a more monetary motive for the attack. However, the case becomes complicated with the discovery that a local restaurateur, who had recently learnt his wife had been having an affair with the male victim, has also met an untimely end. With Honor Blackman, Philip Franks, James Hazeldine and Jeff Rawle

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The investigation of a burglary at a quarry turns into something far more serious when a security guard's badly beaten body is discovered at the scene of the crime. An autistic teenager is arrested for the murder, despite Inspector Frost's misgivings - a move which triggers a chain of tragic events culminating in a tense stand-off. Crime drama, starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, Caroline Harker and Maurice Roeves

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The detective's investigation into the death of a nameless Russian leads to a mysterious military facility run by Colonel Harry Galt, a respected soldier with an impeccable war record. However, as Foyle makes inquiries, he realises the deceased was a spy with dangerous connections to British Intelligence. Meanwhile, Sam does her best to help husband Adam during his by-election campaign, but can't help putting her foot in it. Crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen and Honeysuckle Weeks, with Jonathan Hyde and Daniel Weyman

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Sunny makes further investigations into David Walker's life that suggest he was a troubled man with a number of issues. Cassie has a prickly chat with Marion about her past and the inquiry reveals her close relationship with an IRA activist. As the police investigation encroaches on their life, Sara and Colin open up to their partners with secrets about their past. Whodunit, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Lorraine Ashbourne, Mark Bonnar, Douglas Hodge, Wendy Craig and Holly Aird

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Part one of two. While holidaying in Cornwall with his friend Captain Hastings, the sleuth meets a local woman who has seemingly become unaccountably accident-prone - but soon starts to suspect she is actually a victim of foul play. David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star

As Barnaby and Troy embark on a baffling investigation in an attempt to determine the truth, Joyce starts digging into the past to discover the assassin's motives. John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Hugh Bonneville star

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack is asked to investigate the theft of a car belonging to a friend of Mullett, but misjudges the grizzled Superintendent's capacity for tact and diplomacy and it is not long before he is taken off the case. Things take a shocking turn when the car finally turns up - with the body of a drug dealer in the boot. Detective drama, starring David Jason, with Melanie Thaw and Bruce Alexander

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective investigates when a victim of fraud is found murdered on a golf course - but his inquiries are complicated by the discovery of a tramp's mutilated body nearby. To make matters worse, beautiful singer Bella Duveen is also around, seemingly intent on helping herself to a grim souvenir. David Suchet stars, with Hugh Fraser, Bill Moody and Jacinta Mulcahy

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar return as detectives Cassie and Sunny, who find themselves thrown into another historic murder case with the discover of a body. This time it's the perfectly preserved remains of a middle-aged man found in a suitcase in the silt of a London river. As the detectives begin the complicated task of trying to identify the victim, four unconnected people go about their business - Brighton-based lawyer Colin Osborne, paediatric nurse Marion Kelsey, teacher Sara Mahmoud and respected police officer Tessa Nixon - unaware they are about to be dragged into the investigation. Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar star, with Mark Bonnar, Lorraine Ashbourne, Charlie Condou and Wendy Craig

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The death of an unpopular art dealer leaves Poirot with a long list of suspects within his tangled, squabbling family - even though his eccentric wife had predicted his end. Detective drama, starring David Suchet, with Emma Fielding, Fiona Walker and Jeremy Northam

programme.desc: Zak and Lisa worry about Butch as he is still missing. Alex confides to Kim that he has a cashflow problem. Will receives a shock from a mystery girl at his party

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Alf poses as a criminal as part of an undercover operation, but his covert actions only reveal startling information about Miller's ethical beliefs. Rural drama, starring William Simons, John Duttine, David Stockwell and Gwen Taylor

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Owing to a little white lie on his income tax returns, Mr Roper must quickly acquire a son. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin and Jo line up to star in Chrissy's home video, but Mr Roper is interested in a different kind of film. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

Things take a shocking turn when the car finally turns up - with the body of a drug dealer in the boot. Detective drama, starring David Jason, with Melanie Thaw and Bruce Alexander

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A gang of youths push Peggy down a hole while she's poaching. Lord Ashfordly alerts Miller, who gives chase - but lands himself in trouble when he knocks down an elderly pedestrian. However, the incident gives Peggy a new money-making idea - she'll sue for the 'injury' she sustained in the fall. Meanwhile, Gina is attracted to her handsome college tutor. Tim Brooke-Taylor and Murray Head guest star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Tony wants to know where Will has disappeared to. Sarah drags Rachel out for a night out. Terry gets jealous of Alan's relationship with Jo

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will tries to make an escape from the barn. Zoe tells Dee that Eric has been taking pig steroids. Becky calls the police about Will's disappearance

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des tries to apologise to Derek. Deirdre tells Alec he's upsetting Roy. Vera worries when money goes missing from the till. Ken is horrified when Kelly agrees to work for Denise

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Joyce apologises to the Malletts for misleading them. Ken and his solicitor meet with Denise to discuss custody of Daniel. Liz visits Steve and asks him to help put Fraser off

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A pupil at the prestigious Devington School dies of a stab wound while competing in a race in honour of his recently deceased grandfather. DCI Barnaby discovers the death could be linked to a long-running rivalry between the school and the locals - or to the youngster's membership of an elite club dedicated to dining on suet puddings. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Jane Wymark

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Dour detective Jack Frost investigates a woman's near-fatal shooting. The victim was all set to testify against a notorious drugs baron accused of murdering one of his employees, but the appearance of a contract killer makes her think again - and it appears someone on Jack's team is leaking information. Meanwhile, the station is turned upside down in the hunt for a missing lottery ticket. David Jason, Michael McKell and Bruce Alexander star

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The peace of the sleepy hamlet of Little Worthy is disturbed when a man's body is found tied down in a miniature village - just like the hero in classic tale Gulliver's Travels. As the investigation begins, Barnaby has no shortage of suspects, including the victim's recently jilted partner - a teacher whose classroom is full of paintings of the story - his teenage lover, a caretaker and a hotel owner. But the case takes a twist when the killer strikes again amid the chaos of the annual fancy-dress boat race. Detective drama, guest starring Jesse Birdsall and Olivia Colman, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: With their victim identified, Cassie and Sunny begin to find out a bit more about David Walker by talking to his ex-wife, DI Tessa Nixon, who reveals he suffered from depression. A search through the original investigation files and some numbers from David's pager help build a picture of him - and also lead to a few potential suspects. However, his son Jason struggles to deal with the news that someone murdered his dad. Whodunit, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Lorraine Ashbourne, Mark Bonnar, Douglas Hodge, Nigel Lindsay and Will Brown

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Beautiful Russian aristocrat Countess Vera Rossakoff, the chief suspect in a series of jewel thefts, seemingly captivates Poirot with her charm and intellect, meaning Hastings and Miss Lemon have to do most of the actual detective work and ensure she is brought to justice. Drama, guest starring Kika Markham

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A gang of elderly villains spot a chance for one last, glorious crime spree when the villagers leave Aidensfield en masse to support Rob in a charity football match. Peg finally gives David a bit of support when it turns out his jury duty is more trouble than he imagined. Rural police drama, starring Sophie Ward, Jonathan Kerrigan, Gwen Taylor and David Lonsdale

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Fiona taunts Will by telling him she spent the night with his family. Steve demands to know what Kim has been doing with the company money. Rachel tells Kathy about her and Jack

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will is confident that his dad will find him. Rachel finds Sarah in tears over Jack's behaviour. Chris attempts to blackmail Kim over the missing money

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alec plants marked £5 notes in his coat pocket at work. Samantha is interested to hear Sean has dumped Liz. Liz visits Fraser and tells him to stop hounding her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Martin wants to buy Curly's car for Gail to learn to drive in. Anne and Vera organise a party for Curly. Don is hurt when Sarah Louise tells him he's not invited for Christmas

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bodies of a glamorous senior citizen and a distinguished doctor are found beside a river - and although suspicion for their murders initially falls on poachers, Barnaby suspects a more monetary motive for the attack. However, the case becomes complicated with the discovery that a local restaurateur, who had recently learnt his wife had been having an affair with the male victim, has also met an untimely end. With Honor Blackman, Philip Franks, James Hazeldine and Jeff Rawle

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The investigation of a burglary at a quarry turns into something far more serious when a security guard's badly beaten body is discovered at the scene of the crime. An autistic teenager is arrested for the murder, despite Inspector Frost's misgivings - a move which triggers a chain of tragic events culminating in a tense stand-off. Crime drama, starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, Caroline Harker and Maurice Roeves

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The detective's investigation into the death of a nameless Russian leads to a mysterious military facility run by Colonel Harry Galt, a respected soldier with an impeccable war record. However, as Foyle makes inquiries, he realises the deceased was a spy with dangerous connections to British Intelligence. Meanwhile, Sam does her best to help husband Adam during his by-election campaign, but can't help putting her foot in it. Crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen and Honeysuckle Weeks, with Jonathan Hyde and Daniel Weyman

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Sunny makes further investigations into David Walker's life that suggest he was a troubled man with a number of issues. Cassie has a prickly chat with Marion about her past and the inquiry reveals her close relationship with an IRA activist. As the police investigation encroaches on their life, Sara and Colin open up to their partners with secrets about their past. Whodunit, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar, with Lorraine Ashbourne, Mark Bonnar, Douglas Hodge, Wendy Craig and Holly Aird

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Part one of two. While holidaying in Cornwall with his friend Captain Hastings, the sleuth meets a local woman who has seemingly become unaccountably accident-prone - but soon starts to suspect she is actually a victim of foul play. David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star

programme.desc: Arthur and Ray live it up in Australia, spending money like there's no tomorrow _ but they face tough opposition for the Daley inheritance. Drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: When a CIA agent dies after being thrown off a balcony, the unit sets up a fake arms deal with the German terrorist cell responsible. However, the gunrunners uncover the ploy, kidnap Bodie and transform him into a walking time-bomb. Lewis Collins stars

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan uses a criminal's abandoned dog as bait to lure his remorseful owner back into the country from France. However, associates of the villain spirit the hound away from its pound and a race begins as to who can locate the dog first. Alfred Marks, Brian Glover and Brian Wilde guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar poses as a Russian secret police chief to catch an assassin who has claimed the lives of 13 intelligence agents. Starring Roger Moore, Glynn Edwards and Burt Kwouk

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An ailing diplomat asks Holmes to retrieve a document about a highly sensitive treaty between Britain and Italy, which an opportunistic thief has stolen from his desk at the Foreign Office. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett, David Burke and David Gwillim

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Enemy Agent Arcos imprisons Steed and through plastic surgery creates a double of him to jeopardise a peace conference. King must find the real Steed with the help of a dashing blond German count (guest star Ian Ogilvy). With Ray McAnally

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur, Ray and Dave go on a day-trip to Calais, intending to stock the Winchester's cellars with duty-free plonk, but soon find themselves in trouble. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle considers his future in CI5 after it transpires the father of his fiancee is under surveillance by the unit, suspected of being part of an international drug-smuggling ring. Patricia Hodge guest stars, with Martin Shaw

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Recently released criminal Eddie Boyse becomes prime suspect in an assault case - and Regan believes he is guilty. Unfortunately for the officer, Boyse has the perfect alibi - he was in Regan's company when the crime was committed. Drama, starring John Thaw, with Dennis Waterman and Del Henney

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: A family of five from Bath dubbed the Eager Beaverstocks answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Quiz, hosted by Warwick Davis

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Meera Syal (The Kumars), fashion designer David Emanuel, former England rugby player Kyran Bracken and comedian Johnny Vegas compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II (1985)
programme.desc: Incarcerated Special Forces veteran John Rambo is offered the chance for freedom by former commander Colonel Trautman if he takes up the offer to return to the jungles of Vietnam on a life-or-death mission to rescue American PoWs. During the course of the operation, he develops strong feelings for his guide, a female freedom fighter - but tragedy strikes, leaving him more determined than ever to exact a bloody and explosive revenge. Action adventure sequel, starring Sylvester Stallone, Richard Crenna, Julia Nickson-Soul, Steven Berkoff, George Kee Cheung, Andy Wood and Martin Kove

programme.desc: A music teacher asks Holmes to discover the identity of a mysterious bearded cyclist who often follows at a distance as she makes her way to work. Period crime drama, guest starring Barbara Wilshere, Michael Siberry and John Castle

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: A foreign agent in the guise of Colonel Mannering (Christopher Lee) finds an ingenious method of extracting secret information from British agents. Classic fantasy spy drama, starring Patrick Macnee and Linda Thorson

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur attempts to protect his friend Sidney, who on mistakenly being diagnosed with a fatal illness, arranged for a hitman to kill him so his wife would benefit from his life insurance. Andrew Sachs guest stars, with George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 enters a deadly race with the KGB to free a suspected double agent while he is in transit from prison to court, in the hope the action will flush out a mole operating inside the unit. Action adventure, starring Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan is forced to impose himself on an old girlfriend whose flat is conveniently near a bank that intelligence has revealed is to be raided. Once in position, he and Carter try to pinpoint a radio transmitter that is being used to coordinate the movements of the robbers. Detective drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of five family members from Glasgow answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: Licence to Kill (1989)
programme.desc: While on leave to attend the wedding of his friend, CIA agent Felix Leiter, James Bond is asked to help with a secret mission to capture notorious drug baron, Franz Sanchez. Though successful, Sanchez later escapes and seeks revenge on Leiter, killing his new bride and leaving Leiter for dead. Incensed by this, Bond refuses his next mission from MI6 to go in search of Sanchez, leaving M with no alternative but to revoke Bond's licence to kill. Now considered a rogue agent, Bond goes undercover to pose as an assassin for hire within Sanchez's drug empire, to bring him down from the inside. Spy thriller, starring Timothy Dalton, Robert Davi, Carey Lowell, Talisa Soto and Benicio Del Toro

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: FBI agent Sean Archer captures terrorist Castor Troy, the man who killed his son. While Troy is in a coma, Archer has the crook's face surgically grafted onto his own so he can go undercover and locate a bomb planted somewhere in Los Angeles. But then Troy regains consciousness - and in turn takes on Archer's identity. John Woo's action thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, John Travolta, Joan Allen, Gina Gershon and Dominique Swain

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II (1985)
programme.desc: Incarcerated Special Forces veteran John Rambo is offered the chance for freedom by former commander Colonel Trautman if he takes up the offer to return to the jungles of Vietnam on a life-or-death mission to rescue American PoWs. During the course of the operation, he develops strong feelings for his guide, a female freedom fighter - but tragedy strikes, leaving him more determined than ever to exact a bloody and explosive revenge. Action adventure sequel, starring Sylvester Stallone, Richard Crenna, Julia Nickson-Soul, Steven Berkoff, George Kee Cheung, Andy Wood and Martin Kove

Andrew Sachs guest stars, with George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 enters a deadly race with the KGB to free a suspected double agent while he is in transit from prison to court, in the hope the action will flush out a mole operating inside the unit. Action adventure, starring Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan is forced to impose himself on an old girlfriend whose flat is conveniently near a bank that intelligence has revealed is to be raided. programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of five family members from Glasgow answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: Licence to Kill (1989)
programme.desc: While on leave to attend the wedding of his friend, CIA agent Felix Leiter, James Bond is asked to help with a secret mission to capture notorious drug baron, Franz Sanchez. Though successful, Sanchez later escapes and seeks revenge on Leiter, killing his new bride and leaving Leiter for dead. Incensed by this, Bond refuses his next mission from MI6 to go in search of Sanchez, leaving M with no alternative but to revoke Bond's licence to kill. Now considered a rogue agent, Bond goes undercover to pose as an assassin for hire within Sanchez's drug empire, to bring him down from the inside. Spy thriller, starring Timothy Dalton, Robert Davi, Carey Lowell, Talisa Soto and Benicio Del Toro

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: FBI agent Sean Archer captures terrorist Castor Troy, the man who killed his son. While Troy is in a coma, Archer has the crook's face surgically grafted onto his own so he can go undercover and locate a bomb planted somewhere in Los Angeles. But then Troy regains consciousness - and in turn takes on Archer's identity. John Woo's action thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, John Travolta, Joan Allen, Gina Gershon and Dominique Swain

programme.desc: Morland Sanders investigates the American food that could be coming to Britain soon as part of a post-Brexit trade deal. with exclusive lab results revealing levels of dangerous bacteria on US supermarket meat. programme.title: Grayson Perry's Big American Road Trip
programme.desc: Grayson travels through the swing state of Wisconsin in the American Midwest - a predominantly white and predominantly rural location, and one of the states that gave President Trump his victory in 2016. He finds a state that is increasingly bitterly divided over identity politics and hot-button cultural issues like abortion and vaccination. Why are these 'culture wars' happening, asks Grayson, and what might help to overcome the divisions? To conclude the series, Grayson makes a map of the American culture wars, one which has strong implications for our own cultural and political divisions in the UK

programme.title: The Truth About Your Sandwich

programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: Following life on Jimmy Doherty's farm during the autumn months, as the team prepare the farm and wildlife park for the oncoming seasonal changes. The team prepares for the arrival of some new, and unpredictable, animals which could prove a handful for Jimmy and the rangers. Meanwhile, wildlife in the woodland starts to harvest the summer's bounty to get ready for winter

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Following three patients who have miraculously survived when the odds were stacked against them, including a motorcyclist who was thrown under a car after crashing into a bus. Elsewhere, cameras follow ex-paratrooper Martin, who has sustained multiple injuries to his neck, pelvis and legs after his paraglider was blown into the hillside during a flight, and 10-month-old Erin, who has a build-up of wax in her ear following a fever

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Thirty-four-year-old plumber Jamie hasn't had a proper girlfriend for almost 10 years. His date, Leigh, is seeking someone muscley and good with his hands. Shelly is a 57-year-old personal trainer who has been single for seven years. Her date is David, a 61-year-old retired firefighter who's been single for four years. Father-of-two Nathan has had a successful career in sales. His date Lisa seeks someone 'nicer' than the guys she usually dates. Last into the restaurant is 27-year-old steampunk enthusiast Joe. His date is 29-year-old Jess, who used to work at the Black Country Living Museum

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: Twelve strangers come together on a lakeside in the beautiful British countryside to try to win a life-changing sum of money. A prize of £100,000 lies on an island in the lake and the 12 must build an 850-foot bridge by hand within 20 days to reach it. In the first episode, the 12 get to know each other, including Billie, the daughter of TV presenter Trisha Goddard, Covid-19 survivor Tara, and the oldest member of the team, 60-year-old Sly. The team attempt to come up with a plan to build the bridge, but tempers quickly fray over who should lead the group

programme.title: Angry, White and American
programme.desc: Journalist Gary Younge journeys across the United States to explore the issue of race, talking only to white Americans to understand why many of them have been sent into angry retreat. He drives from Maine to Mississippi - both cities left behind by disappearing jobs and epidemic levels of drug abuse - and explores why Donald Trump's appeal to white people to help him secure victory in the former democratic heartlands resonated so much

programme.title: Trump: An American Dream
programme.desc: The concluding part of the documentary charts Donald Trump's life from the turn of the millennium, when he was still overspending and still the punchline to many a joke. He eventually reined in his playboy lifestyle and returned to the public eye with his hit TV show The Apprentice. But his political ambitions would have to wait several years. However, when he did finally take the ultimate prize, would anyone still be amused?

programme.title: Adult Material
programme.desc: Jolene and Carroll try to control the fallout from the party, as Tom is taken to hospital and Amy to the police station. Meanwhile, Phoebe is forced to face the music when school discovera what she has done to Paulie, and Gabriel is given some information that destroys his world

programme.title: Five Guys a Week
programme.desc: Now 37, health and diet consultant Charlotte feels that time is running out for her to settle down and have a baby. Her parents, Patricia and Terry, hand the keys of their Surrey mansion to their daughter so she can help find a potential suitor, inviting a mountain-bagging explorer, a gym owner, a fashion boss, a recruitment consultant and a former golf professional to move in alongside her in a bid to kindle romance. Aware that Charlotte has a track record for being drawn to unsuitable 'bad boys', they also resolve to pop over at unexpected moments during the week to check out her choices

programme.title: Vet on the Hill
programme.desc: A nervous border collie must overcome his fear of the vet, a beloved pug may have a fatal tumour and Scott takes a trip to help out at a donkey sanctuary

programme.title: Good Dog, Bad Dog: Inside the World of Doggy Day Care
programme.desc: Zeus the Siberian husky visits Dogs Country Club in Warrington for a week-long stay, and boss David comes up with an idea to make his time more enjoyable - arranging for 30 huskies to visit the centre and give Zeus the chance to run with a pack. Over at Bruce's Doggy Day Care in Surrey, Bedlington cross and TV star Mr Scraps tries to perfect his latest trick

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian heads to the historic Harewood House near Leeds to check on a group of goats that are moving to a new enclosure, but catching them proves quite painful. Peter heads over to lend a hand when a young farmer struggles with a tricky lambing, while Caroline and Ben arrive at the practice in Boroughbridge very worried about their old Jack Russell, Scamp. He's jumped off a stile and badly damaged a ligament in one of his legs

programme.title: Escape to the Farm with Kate Humble
programme.desc: Documentary following life at the presenter's farm in Monmouthshire, where she has been growing produce and breeding livestock for the past 10 years. In the first episode, all is looking rosy for Sausage the Welsh pig, who is hours away from giving birth. After successfully delivering 27 piglets, this should be a breeze, but it soon becomes apparent that Sausage's life - and the life of her unborn litter - are in danger, and Kate gets hands-on to rescue her animal and the little ones

programme.title: Diana: The Interview That Shocked the World
programme.desc: A look back at one of the most memorable moments in TV history, when Diana, Princess of Wales, was interviewed by Panorama reporter Martin Bashir. Diana candidly opened up about her marriage to Prince Charles and her life as a member of the royal family, in a programme that drew an audience of 22.8million people in the UK. With testimony from both BBC insiders and some of those closest to Diana, the programme uncovers why the Princess chose to take this extraordinary gamble and reveal how Bashir - then a comparatively unknown BBC outsider - came to gain her trust

programme.title: Killer Psychopaths
programme.desc: David Wilson analyses the personality and motivations of serial killer Steve Wright, who was convicted in 2008 of murdering five women who worked as prostitutes in Ipswich, and became known as the Suffolk Strangler. With the aid of first-hand accounts from those involved at the time, including investigating officers, journalists and the killer's father, the criminologist reveals how the dark side of Wright's personality eventually took over

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces across the country to reveal how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions against shoplifters. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Mind the Age Gap
programme.desc: With society apparently more divided than ever, 12 volunteers from different generations attempt to bridge the gap by moving into a house together, where they are encouraged to talk about some of the most important issues that affect the world today. An attempt to get to know one another triggers uncomfortable debates revealing controversial opinions from the older generation. Tension is in the air, and gay marriage is the first topic that divides old from young. And while the older guests are keen to debate, the younger ones see an opportunity to party

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: Built more than 1,400 years ago, Canterbury Cathedral is both a holy place and a World Heritage site. It is the 'mother church' for more than 85 million people, and one of the biggest tourist attractions in the UK with nearly a million visitors a year. Tony tells the tale of the cathedral's founding and how, after the cathedral burnt down, it was rebuilt by the Normans as a symbol of their power. He also explores how it became wealthy thanks to its role as a major site of pilgrimage following the infamous murder of Archbishop Thomas Becket

programme.title: Walking Britain's Roman Roads
programme.desc: Dan Jones travels the historic Roman road of Ermin Way, which links the two Roman towns of Calleva Atrebatum and Glevum, now known as Silchester and Gloucester. Not to be confused with Ermine Street, which runs from London to York, Ermin Way is arguably Britain's most industrial Roman road

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: In February 2020, Prince Charles and Camilla, Duchess of Cornwall visit the Tower to celebrate the Yeoman Warders' anniversary, the first time Prince Charles has visited the Tower in over a decade. Meanwhile, the business of researching the Tower's history goes on for Chief Curator, Tracy Borman, as she digs into the tragic story of Henry VIII's fifth wife, Catherine Howard

programme.title: Henry VIII: Rise of a Tyrant
programme.desc: Three-part drama-documentary series revealing the truth about England's most infamous King, King Henry VIII. Filming in historic locations including Hampton Court, Windsor Castle and the Vatican and unearthing new documents never seen before on TV, a team of Tudor experts uncover the real Henry, and explore how his complex personality fundamentally shaped the nation. In the first episode, experts examine how Henry VIII's traumatic childhood affected his personality, from the death of his older brother to the tragic early death of his beloved mother. Narrated by Jason Isaacs

programme.title: Dando: 20 Year Hunt for a Killer
programme.desc: Documentary re-examining the case of Jill Dando's murder, the BBC presenter who was mercilessly shot dead as she entered her Fulham home in April 1999. Two years after her death, Barry George was found guilty of her murder, but following a dramatic retrial in 2008, he was acquitted and released from prison. Now more than 20 years on, this programme looks back at some of the unanswered questions surrounding the case

programme.title: Rhys Jones: 5 Clues That Caught His Killer
programme.desc: Documentary examining the investigation into the murder of 11-year-old Rhys Jones, a schoolboy shot dead on his way home from football training in 2007. The programme looks at how police managed to make the vital breakthroughs that finally put Rhys' killer behind bars, featuring interviews with police officers and specialists directly involved in the case

programme.title: Extreme Nightmare Tenants
programme.desc: Lancashire letting agent Paul Ainsworth Lord has a run-in with a tenant while carrying out a routine inspection on a property - leading to a three-month stand-off. Harrow Council housing officers investigate a residential property being used as a brothel and a Lincolnshire pub owner calls in a lawyer when his tenant, who manages the pub, stops paying rent

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Mind the Age Gap
programme.desc: The cross-generational volunteers continue to live together and debate the key issues that affect the world today. Most of the residents have found their feet, although 27-year-old Naman is feeling isolated, not helped by the others' constant questions about his religion. Single mum Tracy helps octogenarian Dee in her man-quest by enrolling her on Tinder, and the tension between Bob and Ty gets worse

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: In one of the biggest engineering projects of the Middle Ages, Salisbury Cathedral was moved from a wind-blasted Iron Age hill fort to its current location - a feat accomplished in just 38 years, helping establish the Wiltshire city in the process. A place of both ancient tradition and home to one of the country's oldest choirs, Tony witnesses the ritual of inducting a new chorister and sees the oldest working clock in the world. The presenter also reflects on the cathedral's role in a clandestine operation that helped turn the tide of the Second World War

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: Documentary series about the work of dedicated animal lovers who save injured and orphaned wild animals brought into their sanctuary

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Paul Binski, Professor of the History of Medieval Art at Cambridge University, examines the Italianate frescoes at Chalgrove's 14th-century parish church in Oxfordshire. He then views more pre-Reformation treasures in Ranworth, Norfolk, where the church has a finely painted rood-screen and an altar dedicated to women

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton offer advice to the would-be sellers of a four-bedroom house in the Gloucestershire village of Nailsworth. From the outside, the property looks spectacular, but once inside it appears drab and cluttered - and the fact the family's pet rabbit uses the verandah as a lavatory does not help

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Six members of the deaf community share their stories of life in lockdown during the coronavirus outbreak

programme.title: Houseboat (1958)
programme.desc: An Italian socialite rebels against her domineering father and gets a job as a maid for a widowed father. While helping her employer learn to understand his three precocious children, she also falls in love with him and must decide whether or not to reveal her secret. Romantic comedy, starring Cary Grant and Sophia Loren

programme.title: Decision at Sundown (1957)
programme.desc: A gunslinger rides into a backwoods town intent on finding his dead wife's former lover and exacting revenge for her death. The man he blames now has total control of the town and has the sheriff at his beck and call. Undeterred, the drifter offers his enemy an ultimatum - he has until sundown to leave the town or face retribution for his crimes. Western, with Randolph Scott, John Carroll and Andrew Duggan

programme.title: Sorry, Wrong Number (1948)
programme.desc: Rich, neurotic Leona Stevenson lies bedridden at home and is trying to phone her husband. But the lines are crossed, and she accidentally overhears a call in which two men are planning a murder. She frantically tries to raise the alarm, and when at last she manages to convince the telephone company of her story, she comes to realise with increasing horror who their intended victim is. Thriller, starring Barbara Stanwyck, Burt Lancaster, Ann Richards and Wendell Corey

programme.title: 40 Guns to Apache Pass (1967)
programme.desc: A cavalry captain sets out to deliver a shipment of rifles to a fort besieged by marauding Apaches, but the mission is undermined by a villainous corporal who plans to steal the weapons and sell them to the enemy. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Michael Burns, Laraine Stephens, Kenneth Tobey and Michael Keep

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)
programme.desc: Singleton Jane is literally always the bridesmaid and never the bride, a role she assumes for the 28th time when her sister announces she is getting married - to a man Jane is secretly in love with. As she wrestles with her feelings, Jane's predicament attracts the attention of a reporter fascinated by her story. Romantic comedy, starring Katherine Heigl, James Marsden and Malin Akerman

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hoards of the alien creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing

programme.title: Skate Kitchen (2018)
programme.desc: Teenage skateboarder Camille's life as a lonely suburban teenager changes dramatically when she befriends a bunch of other skateboarding girls in New York City. As she journeys deeper into the city's subculture, she begins to understand the true meaning of friendship. Drama, starring Rachelle Vinberg, Dede Lovelace and Nina Moran

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager discovers she is descended from a race of half-human, half-angel warriors whose duty is to defend the world from demons. When her mother disappears, she joins a group of the magical beings on a dangerous journey into an alternate version of New York inhabited by strange creatures. Fantasy adventure, starring Lily Collins, Jamie Campbell Bower, Lena Headey and Jonathan Rhys Meyers

programme.title: Destroyer (1943)
programme.desc: A former welder working on the Navy destroyer whose construction he oversaw angers his crewmates with his relentless quest for perfection. Wartime adventure, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford, Marguerite Chapman and Regis Toomey

programme.title: Last Train from Gun Hill (1959)
programme.desc: A marshal discovers the man responsible for raping and killing his wife is actually the son of an old friend, setting the scene for a showdown. Western, starring Kirk Douglas, Anthony Quinn, Brian Hutton and Carolyn Jones

programme.title: The Furies (1950)
programme.desc: The daughter of a ruthlessly ambitious cattle baron is divided between her love for one of his enemies and the prospect of taking over the family ranch when he dies. But when the cruel rancher has one of her friends hanged, she begins plotting his downfall. Western from director Anthony Mann, starring Barbara Stanwyck and Walter Huston

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri (1954)
programme.desc: An American naval reserve pilot is called up for service in the Korean War, and must leave his family and civilian job as a lawyer. In command of a corps of naval pilots, he heads a bombing campaign on strategic Communist positions, but later comes to question the morality of the conflict. Adventure, starring William Holden, Grace Kelly, Fredric March and Mickey Rooney

programme.title: Enough Said (2013)
programme.desc: A masseuse anxious about her daughter leaving home finds romance with a man also coming to terms with an empty nest. She later befriends a bitter divorced client, who turns out to be her new partner's ex-wife. Romantic comedy drama, with James Gandolfini, Julia Louis-Dreyfus, Catherine Keener and Toni Collette

programme.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard (2017)
programme.desc: A disgraced bodyguard is hired to protect a hitman about to testify against the tyrannical president of Belarus at the International Criminal Court in exchange for the release of his wife from prison. Comedy action thriller, starring Ryan Reynolds, Samuel L Jackson, Gary Oldman and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story (2004)
programme.desc: The struggling owner of a run-down gym is forced to take drastic action to prevent an arrogant fitness guru buying the business out from under him - and enlists his customers to form a dodgeball team in the hope of triumphing in the US championships. Sporting comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Vince Vaughn and Christine Taylor

programme.title: Call Girl (2012)
programme.desc: Two teenagers in 1970s Sweden are seduced into prostitution by a glamorous madam with a wealthy and influential client list. However, her activities are being watched closely by the police and the girls are soon caught up in a scandal that threatens to bring down the government. Drama, starring Sofia Karemyr, Simon J Berger and Pernilla August. In Swedish, English and Polish

programme.title: The Buccaneer (1958)
programme.desc: A general charged with the defence of New Orleans in 1812 learns the British are sending a vast fleet to retake the city. His only hope is to form an alliance with a notorious pirate - but while the buccaneer's loyalties are to his homeland, his crew urges him to side with the invaders. Remake of Cecil B DeMille's classic swashbuckling adventure, directed by Anthony Quinn, starring Yul Brynner, Charlton Heston, Claire Bloom and Charles Boyer

programme.title: Tulsa (1949)
programme.desc: A cattle magnate's ambitious daughter alienates her friends with her single-minded pursuit of wealth as she attempts to fend off the unwanted attentions of greedy oil barons intent on stealing her land. Drama, starring Susan Hayward, Robert Preston, Pedro Armendariz and Lloyd Gough

programme.title: The Naked Truth (1957)
programme.desc: Celebrities threatened with blackmail decide they would rather murder the extortionist than pay him, but things do not go according to plan. Comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, Peter Sellers, Dennis Price, Peggy Mount, Shirley Eaton and Joan Sims

programme.title: The 39 Steps (1959)
programme.desc: An innocent man becomes embroiled in international espionage as he tries to uncover the meaning behind the cryptic last words of a mystery woman, whom he knew for only a brief time before finding her dying in his flat. He must flee for his life from foreign spies and the police, who think he is a murderer. Spy thriller based on John Buchan's novel, starring Kenneth More, Taina Elg, Barry Jones and James Hayter

programme.title: Home Again (2017)
programme.desc: Five months after separating from her husband, Alice Kinney and her daughters relocate from New York to her childhood home in Los Angeles, which belonged to her late father, Oscar-winning film director John Kinney. Eventually things take an unexpected turn when she lets three young guys move in with her. Romantic comedy, starring Reese Witherspoon, Michael Sheen and Candice Bergen

programme.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri (2017)
programme.desc: Grieving mother Mildred Hayes has suffered an unimaginable personal loss, and hatches an idea that drags the residents of Ebbing, Missouri into a maelstrom of revenge. She pressures Sheriff Bill Willoughby and his forces into continuing the investigation into her daughter's murder. It becomes an obsession that has dramatic repercussions for all of the locals. Martin McDonagh's Bafta and Oscar-winning crime drama, starring Frances McDormand, Sam Rockwell and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Why Him? (2016)
programme.desc: A protective dad is far from thrilled when his daughter begins dating a foul-mouthed playboy millionaire, who has made his fortune with the kind of technology that is driving their own old-fashioned printing company out of business. A holiday gathering threatens to go off the rails when he realises the object of her affections is about to pop the question. Comedy, starring Bryan Cranston, James Franco and Zoey Deutch

programme.title: Entertainment (2015)
programme.desc: A middle-aged comedian plays a string of dead-end shows in the Mojave desert en route to meeting his estranged daughter. Drama, starring Gregg Turkington, with John C Reilly, Tye Sheridan and Annabella Lwin

programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney tries to discover who has been warning women not to sleep with him. He narrows the list of possible suspects down to 64 of his former flings, and conducts a hypothetical tournament to determine the most likely culprit - with Lily insisting he must personally apologise to the ones he hurt most

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Marshall becomes terrified of his boss after seeing him yell at a colleague and begins to question whether his job is worth the stress it causes. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Jason Segel, with a guest appearance by comedian Bob Odenkirk

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam discovers someone is sneaking his boat out at night, and assumes the culprits are Don and Joe. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Don disagree about a new house to flip for their construction business. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is appalled when Geoff arranges for them to go out to dinner with her family to celebrate her birthday. Geoff soon discovers that dinner with the Goldbergs is no ordinary meal out: the family repeatedly change tables, Murray insists Adam order from the children's menu, the food is sent back to the kitchen, and Barry wants to amend his order but Beverly won't allow it. By the end of the evening, Geoff reaches breaking-point

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Murray fall out over Adam's plans to pursue a comedy career after his attempts to be funny in woodwork class nearly result in his teacher getting injured. Beverly and Geoff worry that college is turning Erica into a pretentious snob, but they allow Barry to coach them in the finer points of culture in an attempt to stay close to her

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart takes Penny out for a second date, during which she drunkenly reveals her true feelings. Meanwhile, Howard uncovers a flaw in the toilet he designed for a Nasa space shuttle, and asks his friends to help him correct it before the launch. Kaley Cuoco, Kevin Sussman and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon wins a grant to pay for a summer expedition to the North Pole, and invites his friends to join him. However, the gang's imminent departure causes Leonard and Penny to reconsider their feelings for each other. Johnny Gale and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: After identifying the mob informant, Holt, Jake and Rosa make plans to infiltrate FBI headquarters to get the man's files, with the captain bringing in his former partner to help out. Guest starring Dennis Haysbert (24's President Palmer)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Officers at the precinct drop everything to intervene when they suspect that Captain Holt is in danger after their efforts to track down Adrian Pimento's hitman take an unexpected turn. Dennis Haysbert guest stars

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: George Sr is furious when Georgie tries to buy his way out of his household chores, while Sheldon learns to listen when an emotional Paige struggles with her parents' divorce

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: George Sr and Georgie go camping with Meemaw's new boyfriend Dale, but things get complicated when her ex-boyfriend Dr Sturgis tags along. Sheldon and Missy invent a new game

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon stumbles upon a major scientific breakthrough, causing him to feel like a fraud, while Penny steps up her game with Leonard after seeing Howard make a romantic gesture to Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is hurt when Professor Proton (Bob Newark) contacts Leonard for help, so he befriends TV scientist Bill Nye, and Raj gets jealous when Howard crashes a girls' night in making home-made jewellery. Starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki, and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: Scrubs

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD asks his mentor for help with a difficult patient, but is disappointed at his casual attitude. Elliot makes enemies among the nursing staff, and Turk gets a date with Carla. Zach Braff and Donald Faison star

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya DiMeo has moved her family to a new home and school as she has finally found a class with a full-time aide who can serve as eldest son JJ's voice, as the teenager has cerebral palsy and uses a communication board to converse. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Minnie Driver, John Ross Bowie and Micah Fowler

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya remains conflicted about Kenneth's ability to handle JJ's needs, but JJ is sure he has made the right decision, especially when Kenneth creates a new look for him

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Holt find the motivation to help Captain CJ with a big case that is proving problematic. Jeffords imposes a green initiative and tells Gina to remove her precious portable heater from the office. Diaz and Boyle take a break from the night shift to visit a foot massage parlour

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle enlists Peralta's help in tracking down his son's favourite toy for Christmas, but they find themselves accidentally facing off against a Latvian crime ring as a result. Back at the precinct, the team members get ready for the annual Christmas carol competition against their rivals at the Metropolitan Transit Authority. Mary Lynn Rajskub guest stars

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Lainey moves back to town and Barry invites her to the prom, but when she refuses, he plans a prank with Principal Ball's car to get out of going. Erica tells Murray she has made a final decision about her future at college, but he is so furious that he insists she pay her own way for rent and food

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Adam celebrates his 16th birthday, his parents are too distracted by Barry and Lainey's engagement and Erica's band ambitions to acknowledge their youngest son's big day. However, the situation presents an opportunity for Adam to ask Erica to put him on the high school social map. Meanwhile, Beverly thinks she can scare Barry and Lainey straight with the reality of being adults

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's purchase of a dining-room table causes Sheldon to re-evaluate his life. Meanwhile, Howard is offered the chance to go back to the International Space Station, and Bernadette struggles to decide whether to encourage him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Melissa Rauch

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After arguing with Sheldon, Howard tries to make amends by taking him to Nasa's headquarters in Houston. Elsewhere, Penny has second thoughts about quitting her job as a waitress when her car dies, while Amy tries to find Raj a date. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Tom confides in Romeo that he does not want to hold Yazz back. Meanwhile, Warren, Felix and Brody scramble for a solution when the meeting with Cormac does not go to plan

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day approaches, Barry is shocked when an attractive teaching assistant agrees to go out with him. Meanwhile, Adam and Dana worry that they've missed their chance with their new crushes

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
