Meanwhile, Howard uncovers a flaw in the toilet he designed for a Nasa space shuttle, and asks his friends to help him correct it before the launch. Kaley Cuoco, Kevin Sussman and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon wins a grant to pay for a summer expedition to the North Pole, and invites his friends to join him. However, the gang's imminent departure causes Leonard and Penny to reconsider their feelings for each other. Johnny Gale and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: As Verity and new boy Charlie grow closer, Maeva returns with a scandalous secret that could rip the group apart. Back in Chelsea, Zara and Melissa's friendship is on the rocks, but their friends are determined to bring them back together

programme.title: Wife Swap USA

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the disastrous fight with Caleb, Buffy begins to doubt if this is a battle she can win - while the potentials start looking elsewhere for leadership. The population of Sunnydale flee the town as the signs of impending doom grow, Faith has a run-in with the police and Spike and Andrew are sent on a mission to learn more about Caleb

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: While investigating a kidnapping, Angel is captured by the owners of an underground arena who pit him against powerful demons in a fight to the death. David Boreanaz stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny becomes addicted to an online game based on the world of Conan the Barbarian. As her obsession intensifies, she begins to neglect her friends and seeks the company of the usually snide Sheldon, whom she continually pesters for advice. Starring Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Elated at being named one of People magazine's '30 to Watch Under 30', Raj makes a pass at Penny and becomes very arrogant, making it hard for Leonard to maintain a positive perspective on his friend's new-found confidence. Guest starring Charlie Sheen

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick helps Morty to win over his classmate Jessica - the girl of his dreams - by giving his grandson a potion that will make her attracted to him at the school dance. However, everything goes awry when the potion combines with the influenza virus and mutates it, leaving Rick in a race against time to find an antidote

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Programmes including Strictly Come Dancing, The Andrew Marr Show, Antiques Roadshow, Bodyguard, The Yorkshire Vet, Gareth Malone's All Star Music Quiz and The Circle come under the gaze of the armchair critics, as they share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week. programme.desc: Robin agrees to go on a date with ex-boyfriend Simon, despite her friends' misgivings. The pair arrange a night out, but she gets ditched and Barney is left to console her. James Van Der Beek (Dawson's Creek) guest stars, with Cobie Smulders and Neil Patrick Harris

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney and Robin wake up in bed together and make a pact never to mention it to anyone. However, Robin feels guilty and tells Ted, ruining his 30th birthday celebrations and leading him to tell the serial womaniser they can no longer be friends. Meanwhile, Lily rescues a goat

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam's mother-in-law makes an unexpected visit and reveals some shocking news. Guest starring Nancy Lenahan (Veep, Worst Week)

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi resort to their usual punishment in response to Teddy's bad grades

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry looks to secure a spot on the high school football team but is quickly consigned to the bench by Coach Mellor for his lack of sporting prowess. Adam decides to help his brother understand that there are other ways he can contribute to the squad's success

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam sets out to create a sequel to Raiders of the Lost Ark as he admires director Steven Spielberg so much that he has written an original script about Indiana Jones, but his passion for directing is challenged in the process. Barry bets Murray he knows where to find the best cheesesteak sandwich ever, so they drive to New Jersey to settle the issue

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon returns to Texas in disgrace when he discovers his friends tampered with the Arctic expedition data after growing tired of his quest for a scientific breakthrough. Elsewhere, Leonard becomes frustrated as constant interruptions hamper his attempts to woo Penny

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Howard stake their most coveted comic books on a bet over the species of a cricket, while Leonard and Penny struggle to recover from an awkward first night together. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of three. Peralta and Holt must adjust to their new lives in the Witness Protection Programme while crime boss Jimmy 'The Butcher' Figgis is still at large, but their anonymity could be compromised if a video of them goes viral. Rhea Perlman and Maya Rudolph guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part two of three. When crime boss Jimmy 'The Butcher' Figgis sees Peralta and Holt's viral video and comes looking for them, the duo begin their fight back, but things go awry and they end up on the wrong side of the interrogation table. Back at the precinct, a new captain takes over, but is he up to the job? Maya Rudolph and Ken Marino guest star

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Georgie and Sheldon go mining for platinum in roadside gravel. Mary is concerned when Missy misuses religion to help improve her baseball playing

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Meemaw meets Dale's ex-wife June, while Sheldon is forced to work on a group project with reluctant college students. Iain Armitage stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard becomes concerned that Sheldon will overreact when his friend learns the truth about a past indiscretion, while Penny confronts Raj's old flame Lucy about the way she ended their relationship. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is dismayed when the group spends the Thanksgiving holiday at Mrs Wolowitz's house, but hits it off with Bernadette's father. Meanwhile, Penny realises she must deal with a mistake from her past when she and Leonard have an argument. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Elliot confronts Dr Kelso and tells him to stop calling her sweetheart, while JD feels neglected by Turk, who has been spending a lot of time with Carla - and considers getting even by reporting him for professional incompetence

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: An elderly woman teaches JD a valuable lesson, Elliot has a reconciliation with Carla, and Turk tries to break bad news to a hernia patient. Comedy, guest starring Kathryn Joosten, with Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: JJ makes friends with the cool kids and takes part in the time-honoured tradition of pranking their rival school with a little help from Kenneth, but JJ is crestfallen when he can't accompany his friends to the Homecoming bonfire, as the location isn't wheelchair-accessible. This forces Maya to spring into action, which further alienates JJ. Meanwhile, Ray struggles with the constant clutter in the house and Dylan is blindsided when Kenneth casually points out the real reason why she's such an avid runner

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Exploring the city on their own, JJ and Kenneth realise that strangers see them as inspirational. The two push their luck, receiving free food and admission to a baseball game, but things soon fall apart. Meanwhile, as the family can't usually do anything without having to consider wheelchair accessibility, Dylan and Ray convince Maya to take them paintballing while JJ is out - but can Maya allow herself to have fun without JJ?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. A prison van crash sees a mass escape of convicts take place and the entire squad has to track the villains down. Peralta and Santiago make a bet on which of them can bring in the most escaped prisoners, with the loser forced to move into the winner's apartment when they start living together. Former American football star Marshawn Lynch guests

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part two of two. Only one fugitive remains on the loose on the streets of Brooklyn after the mass escape of convicts from the prison van and Peralta is forced to enlist a surprising ally in order to apprehend him. Elsewhere, Santiago and Gina attempt to introduce Boyle to proper texting etiquette. Craig Robinson guest stars

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's girlfriend Jackie returns after spending the summer in New York and seems like a different person. After receiving some bad advice from his loved ones, Adam takes drastic measures to hold on to his relationship. Beverly is not happy with Lainey's domestic skills and decides to teach her future daughter-in-law a thing or two about family catering

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica thinks that all her singing dreams are about to come true when she lands a job at the new karaoke bar in town. However, when she is tasked with bringing in more customers, she is forced to ask Beverly for help. Meanwhile, Murray tries to teach Barry and Lainey how to be financially responsible adults. Rick Springfield guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon receives a nasty surprise when he visits his mother in Houston, while Raj's murder mystery party causes conflict for the rest of the gang members. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is racked with guilt when he tries to date Lucy and Emily at the same time, Penny has trouble deciding whether to take a role in a film, and Sheldon struggles to choose between two gaming systems. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Howard stake their most coveted comic books on a bet over the species of a cricket, while Leonard and Penny struggle to recover from an awkward first night together. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star

Comedy adventure sequel, starring Paul Hogan, Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Charles S Dutton

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

However, when Rick and Summer visit the robot's home planet, they get trapped in what turns out to be a dangerous dimension. Guest starring Claudia Black and Richard Christy

programme.title: Gogglebox

She's an amateur magician with a few dating tricks up her sleeve

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Charles take Terry on a camping trip to help him deal with stress. Amy gets Gina to help her persuade the police department to buy a product she invented as a child. Holt helps Rosa to break up with Marcus. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Amy work together on a case, but wind up arguing over Jake's old, worn-out mattress. Meanwhile, Boyle scratches Holt's prized car, and the teenage boy Rosa sponsors as a 'big brother' is in trouble with the law. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother

programme.title: Man with a Plan

programme.desc: Barry enlists his friends to help him break up Beverly's social group in order to get more of his mother's attention, but when big arguments ensue he realises he's made a major error. Adam's attempts to trick Murray into loving the theatre backfire

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon succeeds in getting Penny to conform to his high standards, so Leonard adopts a similar strategy for his romantic gain. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj meet two women at a goth nightclub and things appear to go well - until they are taken to a tattoo parlour

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Scrubs

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Jimmy is upset that the kids no longer want to participate in the family tradition of dressing up for Halloween, so Maya tries to cheer him up by allowing him to do things he loves. Meanwhile, Ray recruits Dylan to help run the school's haunted mansion

programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits the world's largest jelly bean producers to discover what they are made of instead of gelatine, and Matt Tebbutt finds out why maple syrup is so expensive

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Steve and Sandra met while serving in the Royal Navy, and now that Steve is on the verge of retirement they're looking for a Spanish bolthole to 'wind down' in. They love the area around Casares, so Jasmine Harman is on hand to show them five available properties within their £100,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Windsor to meet Roy, whose garages are stacked full of bikes. Simon also converts some 17th-century wooden beams into a pair of bedside lamps

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Max McMurdo head to Herefordshire to pick through a 70-year-old collection, and find a crate of vintage motor oil bottles that could be worth a small fortune

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As summer arrives, Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree are busier than ever with seven weddings and 14 food lovers' weekends to prepare for. As if that wasn't enough to keep them busy, they must also sort out the garden, work on a stables conversion and embark on a surprising floating adventure

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton comes to the aid of first-time self-builders Howard Lawrenson and Kevin Taylor who are trying to build a bungalow on a plot overlooking a park in Bolton. The tricky part is that first they have to dig a 15-foot hole to put it in and Charlie is worried that the groundworks will be too much for them. When the build gets off to a bad start, it looks like his fears are well founded with the budget in ruins and cafe owner Howard questioning his own role as project manager. However, a sudden change in finances sets the build on a very different course

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Worcestershire, where friends Geri Atterbury and Lorraine Rigby invite guests to stay at Greenways of Malvern. On arrival, couple Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are not impressed by the wild wallpaper, and the lack of an en-suite dismays mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Royal Forester at Bewdley in Worcestershire for their second stay, with proprietors Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker hoping to impress their guests with a trip to a local safari park. Sarah and Luke are impressed with their colourful room, but Sanjeev and Elinor have a 'hairy' experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From Ferry Lodge in Holyhead, Anglesey, where mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway hope to impress the other contestants. However, things do not get off to a good start when Geri and Lorraine are overwhelmed by the number of laminated signs, Sean and Maxine begrudge paying 50p for toiletries and Sanjeev and Elinor are left unimpressed by the cleanliness of the establishment

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Partners Sanjeev Bhagotra and Elinor Roberts welcome their guests to Court Colman Manor, Bridgend, Glamorgan. Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are pleased with the size of their room on arrival, but Sarah Allaway discovers a collection of cobwebs in hers. During the afternoon, the groups take a lesson in fire-making, and the next morning a traditional Welsh breakfast is not to everyone's taste - with the hosts wondering whether tactical voting has played a part come feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet one last time to find out what they have been paid. Geri kicks off proceedings by demanding to know why Sarah and Luke did not want a return visit to Greenways of Malvern, before they in turn confront Sanjeev and Elinor over their low cleanliness score for Ferry Lodge. Then the Court Colman Manor proprietors accuse Sarah and Luke of unfairly judging their hotel, before the payments are revealed and the winners are announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Florence and Nadine, two of Chester's Grevy's zebras, are about to give birth, but other animals are struggling to produce offspring, including Iblis the Asiatic lion. Meanwhile, warthog dad Magnum is feeling the pressure of parenting as two of his older children, Dobby and Neville, are becoming increasingly hard to control, and Magnum is losing his hair with the stress

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up home owners they have previously met on the programme to see how they have got on since they helped them make their decisions. In this episode, Phil catches up with Kathleen and Tom who chose to renovate their three-bedroom Victorian terrace in Gosforth, Newcastle

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge celebrates his birthday with a hot-air balloon ride over the chateau at sunrise, before setting to work in the kitchen making his own jam and alcohol from the vast quantities of fresh fruit waiting to be harvested in the garden. Angel Adoree starts work on a new project of her own - building a geodesic dome on top of a floating platform

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud catches up with Mark and Debbie Sampson in the Lot region of France, to discover how their project of creating a house partly built of straw bales turned out. The couple wanted to use alternative green technology for all the construction work, but could barely communicate with their architect and struggled to integrate with the local community

programme.title: Inside the Spitfire Factory
programme.desc: Peter Monk and his team take on the biggest challenge of the restoration as they attach the wings, while veteran Hurricane pilot Archie McInnes tells his story of survival

programme.title: Guy Martin's WWI Tank
programme.desc: The presenter builds a working replica of a First World War tank to mark the centenary of the Battle of Cambrai, and takes his tank driving test so he can take his creation on to the streets for Lincoln's Remembrance Day parade. He also delves into the history of the earliest armoured vehicles, the soldiers who crewed them, and the women who built them

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Seventy-nine-year-old Carole is brought in with signs of a stroke, and neurologist Dr Mahinda opts for a treatment that only has a slim chance of success. A 77-year-old man with diabetes has an infection in his toes, and doctors consider amputating his foot to stop it spreading. A woman's false eyelashes leave her with abrasions to her eyes

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with regular team captain Sean Lock and guest captain Sarah Millican joined by Roisin Conaty and Rhod Gilbert. David O'Doherty presides alongside Countdown regular Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley provides the letters and numbers

programme.title: Inside the Spitfire Factory
programme.desc: Peter Monk and his team take on the biggest challenge of the restoration as they attach the wings, while veteran Hurricane pilot Archie McInnes tells his story of survival

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of favourite investigations from the team. Jimmy Doherty hears about a threat to British juniper berries that could mark the end of gin's recent resurgence in popularity, while Kate Quilton delves into the contents of herbal bedtime teas to establish if they really can help people get to sleep more easily. Big oyster fan Matt Tebbutt wonders why he never finds pearls in his seafood platters so sets off for China, where he discovers that pearl production is full of surprises

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Friends Carmen and Tanya are looking for a holiday home on the Caribbean island of Antigua, so Danni Menzies searches for something in Carmen's £390,000 price range

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to the Devon countryside to meet Derek and Daphne, where Henry finds a very rare tractor, and Simon finds a Raleigh shopper bike

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Max McMurdo head to Worcestershire where Max transforms some old air tanks into a sports car, while Simon turns old barrels into a trendy bar bench

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge celebrates his birthday with a hot-air balloon ride over the chateau at sunrise, before setting to work in the kitchen making his own jam and alcohol from the vast quantities of fresh fruit waiting to be harvested in the garden. Angel Adoree starts work on a new project of her own - building a geodesic dome on top of a floating platform

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton helps Morag and Heiko Buxel with their continental kit-build home in Stirlingshire. They expect it to take just six weeks to erect their prefabricated family home on the outskirts of their village, but with speed comes pressure as every detail needs to be decided in advance. The couple have an early setback and their summer project becomes a winter struggle. The weather renders the site almost inaccessible as the whole build gets stuck in the mud

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Tower View Hotel, in Blackpool, where owner Jennifer McGirr is joined by friend Diana Carnegie. Daniel Walker and George Gillespie find some unwanted guests in the bathroom and trouble arises at breakfast when some of the guests try ordering off-menu

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit Church Spa in East Markham in Nottinghamshire on their second evening, where proprietor Daniel Walker and family friend George Gillespie hope to wow their guests with their relaxing facilities. Steve and Lisa Tindall seem impressed, but Jennifer and Diana Carnegie question the high price tag

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third hosts of the week are Steve and Lisa Tindall, who own the King's Head Inn in Rye, East Sussex, where they hope their guests will fall for their boutique B&B. They get into the swing of things with a round of blindfolded mini-golf, but not everyone gets a solid night's sleep afterwards

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former breakfast TV presenter Matt Arnold welcomes the contestants to The Bridge Hotel Brandon in Suffolk, and hopes that his mantra of 'beautiful beds, blissful bathrooms and brilliant breakfasts' shines through. The group takes part in a rowing competition in the afternoon, but delays at breakfast and a runny egg cause irritation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid and confront their critics, and things get heated when it's time to count up the cash

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the behaviour of the animals at Chester Zoo. Kendari the babirusa - a bizarre-looking creature also known as a deer-pig - is trying to give birth, but is being disturbed by a couple of mischievous otters. Young male orang-utan Willie struggles to impress the females, while Raz the aye-aye, a rare nocturnal primate related to lemurs, is being encouraged to share his home with two jumping rats

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In the first episode of a new series, Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Rowland family in Stoke who are unsure whether to sell their home or renovate their current property instead. Hospital worker Julie is unhappy with their house and longs to live in a spacious character property, but Allen does not think they will find anything better than what they currently have within in their budget. After a decade long debate, can Phil and Kirstie help the pair make the right decision?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As Dick and Angel prepare for winter, they attend a food festival in Rouen, where they hope to find inspiration over what to do with their fresh fruit and vegetables. Angel adds the finishing touches to the floating geodesic dome in time for a family sleepover, while Dick gets to work fixing the crumbling stucco

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits Andrew Tate and Deborah Mills, who participated in one of the programme's first projects. The pair tried to build a contemporary family home in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, and transform an adjacent water tower into a seven-storey bedroom wing. But while the modern building only took four months to complete, the tower conversion proved more difficult

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 74-year-old man is brought in after being found in a confused state by his son. Doctors discover signs of a brain injury, leading his children to reveal the tragedy that befell their father and the shattering effect it has had on his life. A woman who fell down the stairs at her granddaughter's 16th birthday is also in need of treatment, and her daughter is reminded of a phone call that changed their lives forever. Meanwhile, in paediatrics, a talkative nine-year-old is treated for a rash on his ankle

programme.title: Swingers
programme.desc: Documentary about the scene in which people engage in group sex or swap sexual partners, going behind the scenes at one of Britain's most popular swingers' clubs to find out what kinds of people attend and why

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the words-and-numbers panel game, with Sean Lock and guest captain Joe Wilkinson joined by Seann Walsh and Danny Dyer. Susie Dent is in Dictionary Corner, receiving a helping hand from Bill Bailey, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Hartlepool, the heli-medics are tasked with treating a man hit by a train, and cameras also follow cyclist Trevor, who suffers serious injuries after a collision with a car

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 74-year-old man is brought in after being found in a confused state by his son. Doctors discover signs of a brain injury, leading his children to reveal the tragedy that befell their father and the shattering effect it has had on his life. A woman who fell down the stairs at her granddaughter's 16th birthday is also in need of treatment, and her daughter is reminded of a phone call that changed their lives forever. Meanwhile, in paediatrics, a talkative nine-year-old is treated for a rash on his ankle

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Queens, New York, where he meets a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband-and-wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, while their daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle and at her wits' end

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt find out whether there really are wasps inside fresh figs, why kidney beans should not be eaten raw and how energy drinks work

programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie teams up with cider-maker Andy Thomstone to make a winter version of a popular drink, and demonstrates how to create the Italian favourite limoncello using leftover lemons

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lynda and Steve have worked hard all their lives, but now that their children have all flown the nest and both about to retire, they want to spend their time in their favourite part of Spain, Benalmádena. Jasmine Harman singles out five property options for their £125,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to the north of Wales where they meet Sue, who is clearing out her late husband's antique shop stock. Henry manages to find a pedal car, while Simon takes a toy yacht

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team heads to Sue's house in Tiverton, Devon, finding a moped that brings back memories, and fighting over a petrol gauge that Simon O'Brien wants to upcycle into a clock

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As Dick and Angel prepare for winter, they attend a food festival in Rouen, where they hope to find inspiration over what to do with their fresh fruit and vegetables. Angel adds the finishing touches to the floating geodesic dome in time for a family sleepover, while Dick gets to work fixing the crumbling stucco

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton helps Jayne and Alistair Lewis, a south Lanarkshire couple trying to self-build an innovative, barn-style home which can grow and shrink depending on their needs. They're constructing three connected pods which can be opened-up or shut-down to meet demand. Charlie has lots of suggestions for how to achieve the agricultural look they're after. The build gets off to a great start, but when money gets tight, Jayne and Alistair are left wondering whether they've made a mistake

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Wisteria House, Hampshire, where owner Jane Faulkner invites guests to her establishment. Later, the group members try their hands at milking a cow, while 25-year-old Zak causes surprises when he reveals his years of hospitality experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit The Living Room B&B in Bournemouth on their second night, which is co-owned by 25-year-old Zak Busby-Pelekanou. While at the establishment, Mike and Charlie have a hairy issue, and Jane and Amy encounter a spider, before getting to grips with an ambitious breakfast menu

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Valley Hotel in Anglesey, where owner Mike Lewis hopes his five-star pedigree will help him reap dividends in the competition. After a visit to a local RNLI station, guests Jane and Amy are left feeling sluggish when they spot an unwanted visitor in their room, and their criticism leaves the hosts looking for answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: David and Elvira Barratt welcome the contestants to Barratt's at Ty'n Rhyl, Denbighshire, but the group has an unpleasant experience on arrival. The guests take part in an activity at a local cookery school where they are taught the art of preparing and cooking sheep's testicles. However, come feedback time, the hosts are left feeling distraught

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet to find out who earned the most and have it out with their rivals. Jane and Amy kick off proceedings with a gripe over David and Elvira's coffee criticism, yet are confronted themselves by Zak, who has a score to settle. Mike and Charlie of the Valley Hotel want to get to the bottom of an unwanted intruder during their stay at Wisteria House, and the ladies are challenged again regarding their cleanliness comments. Emotions run high as the cash is counted and the winner is revealed

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the behaviour of the animals at Chester Zoo. An outbreak of disease in the penguin colony leaves chick Munch fighting for his life. Sulawesi macaque Lisa gives birth and dad Mamassa is providing pretty useless, so older brother Beaker steps in to help with the babysitting. Andean spectacled bear Bernie is determined to woo Lima when she enters her short window of fertility, and young male tortoise Football muscles in on 71-year-old Bert's harem of females

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet a family in Cullercoats in North Tyneside who are divided on whether they should sell their home or renovate their current property instead. Suze Drummond has emotional ties to their four-bed Victorian townhouse, but Mark wants to find a property with a better layout, bigger garden and a driveway for their car. Can Kirstie and Phil help them make the right decision?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel expand the project by setting up a luxury campsite on the chateau grounds, but they only have six weeks to complete it before the first guests arrive - and the weather is not on their side, with constant rain turning the planned site into a muddy field. They also have to contend with a visit from Dick's family at Easter

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud returns to the Midlothian countryside to visit Pru and Richard Irvine, who planned to build a family home on an old industrial site. The biggest hurdles they faced were blending the property in with the landscape and working the long hours needed to manage the project. Kevin learns how this scheme fared and whether the locals' fears about an out-of-character building were proven valid

programme.title: The Kennedys: Tragedy & Triumph
programme.desc: Documentary charting the lives of Joseph and Rose Kennedy and their children, uncovering how and why this family so significantly impacted 20th century America, revealing how personal relationships within the Kennedy dynasty helped shape national and global events from the Cuban Missile Crisis to the struggle for civil rights legislation

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: Documentary about Thames Valley Police's investigation into the disappearance of 31-year-old mother of three Natalie Hemming on May 1, 2016. The programme has access to officers as they try to work out whether Natalie is alive or dead, and to her family and friends, struggling with the situation unfolding around them, before an arrest is made and the case reaches its conclusion

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Fifty-two-year-old retired firefighter John is airlifted to A&E after being accidentally hit in the face with a golf club, which hit him so hard that it snapped. With a suspected critical head injury, he is sent for a CT scan, and doctors are concerned that his right eye is not reacting as it should and he is weak down the right-hand side of his body. Meanwhile, 77-year-old Joan arrives in St George's after falling down the stairs at home and hurting her leg. As she waits to be treated, she talks about growing up in Camberwell

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, a man requires urgent medical care after falling from his motorbike. The medics scramble to the Lake District when a walker goes into a cardiac arrest on Ullswater

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of the day a gunman entered a bank in Cincinnati and opened fire, featuring the calls made by those caught up in the atrocity

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.desc: Host Sean Kelly returns to Birmingham, where Heavy D and Sam team up to combine their clout and cash, one of which they seem rather short of

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: In an edition first broadcast in 2007, Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May celebrate British Leyland's 40th birthday by trying to boost the reputation of the cars that once rolled off its production line. The Aston Martin DBS is put through its paces on the test track, Jennifer Saunders is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car and the team asks whatever happened to the beach buggy

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Motor racing driver Lewis Hamilton demonstrates his abilities on the test track, and Richard Hammond tries his hand in a Formula One car. Jeremy Clarkson and James May assess historic vehicles to establish which one pioneered the control layout used in modern cars, and singer-songwriter James Blunt is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef visits Vienna, the city that once ran the Austro-Hungarian Empire and continues to be home to comfort dishes such as tafelspitz and goulash, and which gave its name to one of Europe's most popular dishes - the Wiener schnitzel. Rick learns the essential etiquette to the Austrian capital's coffee house culture and indulges in its sweet tooth by enjoying a plate or two of apple strudel and Sacher torte. He also finds time to enjoy the traditional music of the country, typically Mozart and Strauss

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson subjects the Skoda Yeti to a thorough examination, while Richard Hammond charts the evolution of the Porsche 911 by pitting a modern Turbo S cabriolet against its oldest relative the Volkswagen Beetle - and the power of gravity. James May takes the Ariel Atom V8 for a spin on the test track, and comedian John Bishop receives tuition from the Stig before getting behind the wheel of the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James looks at some of the advances in motoring that never caught on, revealing how the petrol engine came to dominate in the 20th century, while concepts for jet engines and steam power fell by the wayside. He also drives an amphibious car and an electric scooter, and takes a ride in the world's fastest driverless car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city so famous for its food that it's known as the stomach of Italy. He learns how to make the local fresh egg pasta used for tortellini, tagliatelle, ravioli and lasagne and enjoys stuffed rabbit, filled with Parma ham and Parmesan frittata for dinner. Later, Rick drives up into the hills to a cheese dairy where he tastes a 13-year aged Parmesan and enjoys lunch in at a pig farm with restaurant attached, where huge charcoal-grilled pork steaks are served

programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May visit Albania to test three luxury vehicles - the Rolls-Royce Ghost, Bentley Mulsanne and Mercedes-Benz S65 AMG. programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Celebrities undertake some of the most perilous journeys in the world. Driving up Madagascar's eastern coast at the tail end of the rainy season is enough to test the best of friendships, but comedy actor Angus Deayton and broadcaster Mariella Frostrup are game enough to take on the challenge, and good enough friends to poke fun at each other along the way. The route has numerous river crossings and the duo face a variety of broken bridges and flimsy ferries as the only way across, while the roads themselves are mired with thick mud. Progress becomes increasingly painful and they are finally forced to spend a night in the car

Rick is inspired to cook salt cod fritters and an almond tart, before heading for the St Anthony's Day Parade and Sardine Festival

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads

While the drive is a challenge all the way, the country and its people delight and surprise them at every turn

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: A compilation of unseen material from this series of the comedy panel show hosted by Rob Brydon. Team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by celebrity guests to dupe their opponents with plausible lies, featuring contestants including Ronnie Corbett, Bernard Cribbins, Richard E Grant, Jack Dee, Martin Clunes, Julian Clary and Sanjeev Bhaskar

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig 'quarrels', with regular panellist Alan Davies and guest players Jason Manford, Aisling Bea and Anuvab Pal at the brunt of her angst. As usual, the questions are so difficult points are instead awarded for the answers the host finds most interesting as opposed to correct

programme.title: Zapped
programme.desc: With the amulet seemingly out of reach, a new opportunity to get home comes Brian's way when a fire sprite unexpectedly grants him a wish

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A floating bridge in Seattle, one of the longest such structures in the world, intended to connect the growing suburb of Bellevue with the high-tech downtown heart of the city. Plus, Albert Zwueste is on the Dutch Caribbean island of Curacao exploring one of the world's oldest surviving floating bridges, which helped inspire and inform the Seattle project

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: Maritime engineering in recent years has seen ever bigger ships and sea-based platforms constructed. On occasion, they may need moving, which is the purpose of the Boka Vanguard, the planet's largest heavy lift ship, capable of sinking itself, floating under its cargo and then lifting it up to be moved anywhere on the planet with sea. This extraordinary work of engineering is capable of carrying the Eiffel Tower and the Statue of Liberty at the same time

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston talks to author Joy Hancox about the alchemical roots of London, the design of famous buildings such as The Globe theatre and the mysterious figure of English poet John Byrom. He also meets a modern day potion-maker

programme.title: True Evil: The Making of a Nazi
programme.desc: A profile of Adolf Eichmann, the talented bureaucratic civil servant whose robotic willingness to follow orders led him to design the system that would bring about the holocaust

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A Cold War Soviet classic goes under the hammer. Built like a tank, the Moskovitch gets few admirers for style, but finds a loving home with a fan of Eastern Bloc classics

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The stories behind closed roads, including a route once used by the French Resistance and areas made impassable by crumbling hills and sand dunes

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Charleville, Co Cork, to the city of Waterford, along the way finding out about the ancient art of making butter, attempting to learn the basics of Ireland's oldest game, and riding on the Duke of Devonshire's Victorian railway

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the next leg of his journey from Co Kerry to Galway, Michael Portillo travels from the city of Kilkenny to Athy in Co Kildare. Along the way he tries his hand at cutting marble in the Victorian style, uncovers 19th-century Ireland's surprising industrial heritage and learns how the railways helped bring motorsport to the masses

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce returns to BBC Caversham, near Reading, where objects brought in to be valued include a communion book that was originally owned by war poet Wilfred Owen, an Aston Martin sports car, and a finely embroidered 17th-century needlework box that creates a surprise when its value is revealed

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: Documentary following the engineers and aviators who battle to keep the UK's most historic warplanes in the air. In the first edition, the team rebuild a Spitfire MJ772

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: Examining a fleet of cruise ships that are the largest passenger vessels in the world, and revealing how they have built on 19th-century experiments in hydrodynamics

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A fuel plant in Poland built to make Nazi Germany self-sufficient by using the latest technology of the time to turn coal into oil

programme.title: Nazi Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: The theories, conspiracies and facts relating to Rudolf Hess's dramatic flight to Scotland in 1941 and his subsequent death in Spandau prison

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Newbridge in Co Kildare to Roscrea, North Tipperary, visiting the Irish National Stud in Tully, discovering how harsh life was for the Irish poor and investigating an astronomical feat of Victorian engineering

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.desc: Car dealer Mike Brewer buys a Datsun 240Z for a seriously good price, but it has an automatic gearbox. Mechanic Edd China restores the iconic car.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers: Stripped Down

programme.desc: Mike Brewer and Edd China are asked to restore a powerful, luxury 1983 Mercedes 500 SEC, but face a steady challenge in returning it to its former glory

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: PR worker Darius G Laws hosts the second dinner party in Colchester, but knows he will have to work hard after being critical the previous evening. He creates a menu filled with local ingredients and home-grown produce, including his own blackberry wine, and hopes his Roman dress code will be enough to win him the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: American army wife Adrena Austin hosts the third dinner party in Colchester. She hopes her simple menu, which revisits her Armenian heritage, will be a welcome change for her guests, but while reactions to the main course are mixed, her entertainment proves a resounding success

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: James Coe throws the fourth party in Colchester, and his choice of menu proves popular from the starter onwards. However, Jodie Ezekiel finds his incessant discussion of money somewhat off-putting. Fortunately, the prospect of a dip in the host's hot tub improves moods, and gives Darius G Laws a chance to show off his pink pants

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vegetarian Jodie Edzekiel hosts the final dinner party in Colchester, and tries to please her guests by serving them meat, provided she can bring herself to touch it. When Jodie's planned entertainment lets her down, she hopes a sing-a-long with her accompanying on the organ will save the day

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton meets Mia from west London, who is taking early retirement and planning a permanent move to the countryside around Alicante, Spain, on a £170,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien presents a show in which pairs of strangers who have never owned a home before are given a lump sum to buy a property at auction, then have six months to renovate it and get to keep any profit that they make when they sell it. programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's mother Lois comes to stay with the family for a week, but seems to be more interested in her crossword puzzles than in Ray or the children. Katherine Helmond guest stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra decides it is Ray's turn to take charge of birth control, but he backs out of having a vasectomy and buys a less drastic form of contraception - which Frank somehow mistakes for sweets. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Peter Boyle

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberry's in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired tugboat captain and keen skier Geoff is torn between his love of the sea and the mountains. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps recently retired Baksho, who is looking for a holiday home in the resort of Gran Alacant on Spain's popular Costa Blanca and has a budget of £100,000

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Beautician Rachael and maintenance manager Aeron buy and renovate a house in Manchester, but have very different ideas about what the end result should look like

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode features three people who experienced incredible adventures when they were younger, and how they had to adjust when life threw them off track. Barbara is rushed into St George's with a dangerously high heart rate, after the 74-year-old became dizzy while out shopping. Her daughter Ana discusses her mum and dad's phenomenal success in the jazz world, and how all that changed when Barbara was diagnosed with Parkinson's. John is brought into hospital, having woken up unable to move his right leg. Doctors are concerned he may have suffered a stroke. John shares tales of his glamorous life on the airlines in the 1960s

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The work of the emergency services, capturing the entire process from the moment a call is taken at the control centres to the teams' work on the front line

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singers Claire and Louise arrive at the restaurant to provide a bit of moral support to each other, making a foursome with Mathew, who works in a supermarket, and engineering manager Scott. Meanwhile, 22-year-old Aryeh hopes fellow student Jack will not be put off by his overwhelming personality and 60-year-old Meryl from Wirral is looking for someone to keep up with her when she goes clubbing. Will Whitchurch divorcee Andrew be up for a dance?

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britain's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists visit the most excavated monastic site in Europe, tucked away in the corner of an industrial park in Runcorn, Cheshire. An investigation into the bones of the people buried here reveals a story of medieval knights, brutal murder, and generations of people afflicted by an ancient disease

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present Bread Week, which kicks off with a sweet and savoury signature round. For the technical challenge, the bakers are asked to create a tribute to the NHS, while the Showstopper is an ambitiously artistic challenge featuring decorative designs in bread. Judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood sample their efforts, and choose this week's Star Baker - and this week's departing contestant

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo Brand is joined by judge Paul Hollywood, presenter and comedian Judi Love and comedian Aisling Bea to discuss the best bits from Bread Week. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Banker Mandeep Rajput is keen to impress as he hosts the first dinner party in Dudley, West Midlands, joined by musical pensioner Di Dawson, quiz master Adam Reece, dog groomer Vicky Pell and businesswoman Sarah Freeman

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pub quiz host Adam Reece takes charge of the second dinner party in Dudley, West Midlands, hoping his 'mixed up' theme, Italian menu and game show-style entertainment will be enough to win him the £1,000 prize

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert grows tired of the lack of privacy at his parents' house and moves out, only to end up living with a couple who are uncannily similar to Marie and Frank

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Jealousy rears its ugly head when his inexperienced colleague Andy achieves Ray's lifelong ambition of having an article published in Sports Illustrated magazine

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in New Jersey to help Rose Leone, who spent two years in a coma and came out of hospital to learn her son Michael had run her once-thriving Italian restaurant into the ground. With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Chris and Marie who are looking for the perfect place to enjoy their retirement in Manilva on Spain's Costa del Sol, with a budget of £125,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps a couple who run a pub-restaurant in County Durham to find a home on the Greek island of Kefalonia on a budget of £120,000

programme.title: Guy Martin's World Speed Records
programme.desc: The presenter looks back on some of his proudest engineering moments from the past 10 years, remembering five occasions when he broke into the record books. The programme features the world's fastest toboggan, the furthest distance covered in a two-man recumbent bicycle in 24 hours, the world's fastest gravity racer, the world's fastest tractor, and the highest speed ever achieved on a wall of death

programme.title: Grayson Perry's Big American Road Trip
programme.desc: Grayson travels through the swing state of Wisconsin in the American Midwest - a predominantly white and predominantly rural location, and one of the states that gave President Trump his victory in 2016. He finds a state that is increasingly bitterly divided over identity politics and hot-button cultural issues like abortion and vaccination. Why are these 'culture wars' happening, asks Grayson, and what might help to overcome the divisions? To conclude the series, Grayson makes a map of the American culture wars, one which has strong implications for our own cultural and political divisions in the UK

programme.title: Trump: An American Dream
programme.desc: The documentary charts Donald Trump's business dealings in the 1990s, when things were not going well for the future president. His wife Ivana had found out about his affair and was seeking a vast divorce settlement, while his business was in deep financial trouble. It seemed the man with the Midas touch had become a national joke, with tabloids and talk shows picking over his personal life

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Animal lover Rachel Imms hosts the fourth party of the week from Mansfield. She opts for a French-themed evening, but her complicated main course proves to be a challenge, and her accordionist entertainer does not appeal to everyone in the way she had hoped

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Now 37, health and diet consultant Charlotte feels that time is running out for her to settle down and have a baby. Her parents, Patricia and Terry, hand the keys of their Surrey mansion to their daughter so she can help find a potential suitor, inviting a mountain-bagging explorer, a gym owner, a fashion boss, a recruitment consultant and a former golf professional to move in alongside her in a bid to kindle romance. Aware that Charlotte has a track record for being drawn to unsuitable 'bad boys', they also resolve to pop over at unexpected moments during the week to check out her choices

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Annie and Sherri-Leigh buy a house in the Welsh Valleys at auction and then have six months to renovate it before trying to sell it for a profit. Simon O'Brien presents

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay worries about the state of the garage, and asks Michael to have it refurbished, but he finds the cost of a contractor too expensive, so takes on the job himself

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael bumps into a high-school friend who is a keen weightlifter and asks him for help getting back in shape

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Ben Reeve from Lewisham Council's Rogue Landlord Unit aims to help Lola, who stopped paying rent 18 months earlier in an effort to get her negligent landlord to deal with her dilapidated flat's many problems. Eviction specialists also come to the aid of Amit, who found himself continuing his late father's battle with a nightmare renter, and 70-year-old landlady Joan, who started receiving unnerving threats from her rent-skipping tenant after she started legal proceedings to get him evicted

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The efforts of north London landlord Franc to evict a tenant withholding rent payments on a property whose boiler mysteriously stopped working whenever the rent was due, and a tenant with asthma who has been forced to sleep on his sofa for two years in a damp flat. Plus, a landlord owed £7,000 in rent discovers her nightmare is not over when she evicts the tenant and gains access to her property

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments. Brian and Graham have been warned to expect trouble as they evict some tenants from a south London flat, one of whom has a reputation for violence. Everything goes smoothly until the enforcement agents make a shocking discovery in a child's bedroom. Paul and Steve head to Slough to collect wages owed to a freelance worker, but the debtor is less than happy to find the high-court enforcement officers on his doorstep and things get physical

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Enforcement officers are faced with the difficult job of evicting a woman with two children - a task that takes a turn for the worse when her ex-partner makes an appearance. In Liverpool, locals threaten a riot over an unpaid debt at a computer shop, while two agents come across an extremely rare car in the course of their duties

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Steve discover a locked wooden case when they are called to evict tenants from a flat in London's Docklands. Opening it up, they realise they urgently need police back-up - and the property quickly becomes a crime scene. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town FC to collect a debt, while Paul's team arrives at a property in Essex to find that they have to remove a woman and her six children

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul, Steve and Ben make a shocking discovery when they break into a home in Essex while serving an eviction notice on a single mother and her two children. Meanwhile, Stewart and Iain receive more than just threats from the staff and owner of a taxi business, a car dealer has to choose between paying up or losing his showroom stars, and an Indian restaurant owner is in danger of losing his livelihood

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers pursue two knife-wielding criminals driving a stolen vehicle, and the number plate on a drug dealer's car flashes up on the police radar, leading to a risky interception

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Car thieves steal a BMW and as they lead officers in a high speed chase across north London their attempts to escape become more and more desperate. Another driver is spotted swerving across the motorway, and the Interceptors find him to be four times over the drink driving limit. programme.desc: Nicolette wants Levi to be re-evaluated, while Levi is furious with Sheila over her tampering. Pierce and Chloe struggle to grieve together, and Chloe finds it hard to open up

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mac and Tane are stuck in a lift, Justin and Ava make the best of their last day together before his surgery. Alf and Irene want to help John with his loneliness

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: Profile of a 67-year-old Somerset man who is hoping to get married for the ninth time, once his 27-year-old fiancee arrives from the Philippines. Ron believes that having Cristel around to care for him during in his old age will make him less of a burden on the state. Plus, a Lowestoft carer who looks after his wife hopes that moving into their first proper home together will bring them more happiness, and an out-of-work Liverpool man dreams of a life on the ocean waves

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Two expats buy the bar they discovered on their honeymoon 21 years before, while a tattooist moonlights as both a reggae singer and a DIY visual artist. A Scottish couple bought a bargain Segway business, but making it work takes a lot of hard graft

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Extreme cleaners Richard and Brennan travel to Gateshead to help 40-year-old sci-fi collector Abi, whose massive horde of toys, posters and films has completely taken over her home

programme.title: Shoplifters: At War with the Law
programme.desc: Documentary following shopping centre security teams who are locked in a cat and mouse battle to catch criminals using every excuse and trick to evade capture. At Weston Favell in Northampton, Cliff is alerted to a woman who is onto her second store of what appears to be a shoplifting spree, while security guard Paul takes a call about a group of women who have been seen on CCTV taking items from a high street store at West Orchards Shopping Centre in Coventry

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary about gypsies fighting to keep their traditions alive and the locals trying to ban them. Traveller Tony dreams of a new life for his family so he has set up a sunbed business with millionaire non-traveller Colin. However, the neighbours have got a court order to prevent him setting up the company. Margaret, a single mother of seven, just needs a roof over her head after being evicted, while Simey Connors prepares a grand funeral for his brother Mikey, a legend in the traveller community

programme.title: Harlan Coben's Safe

In north London, 40-year-old Faye has become overwhelmed by her compulsive shopping. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

In Lewisham, the council's Rogue Landlord Unit raids one of their main streets, on the lookout for slum conditions, illegal overcrowding and criminal activities

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town FC to collect a debt, while Paul's team arrives at a property in Essex to find that they have to remove a woman and her six children

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

Meanwhile, Stewart and Iain receive more than just threats from the staff and owner of a taxi business, a car dealer has to choose between paying up or losing his showroom stars, and an Indian restaurant owner is in danger of losing his livelihood

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul Bohill and Steve and Ben Pinner face their biggest eviction yet - taking on squatters in a large central London office block. With the help of the police, they try to remove a suspected group of 70 from the building, but with a barricade in place, the team faces a challenging operation ahead. Elsewhere, officers are confronted by an army of family and friends when they attempt to enforce a writ at the property of a debtor, and face a difficult eviction at the north London home of a heavily pregnant tenant and her family, after the council fails to pay the rent to the landlord

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An explosion at a mausoleum exposes a number of freshly dismembered bodies, prompting the team to launch a multiple murder investigation to identify the victims. programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A person dressed in a clown costume murders a bakery owner. The evidence leads to a man from Flack's past who reluctantly agreed to join the witness protection programme to testify against drug dealers. Crime drama, starring Eddie Cahill

programme.desc: Mac and Jo investigate the death of a Spanish club promoter and are surprised to find a police officer from Barcelona at the crime scene. programme.desc: A student accuses the star of a reality singing competition of molesting her. As more victims come forward, the suspect is adamant he did not commit the crimes, so the team must devise a new strategy

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Junior officer Amelia Albers is arrested for a drink-driving, but her ripped clothes and other injuries cause the police concern and they call in Benson for advice. A group of soldiers from her unit is suspected of her rape, but the young woman does not want to cooperate with the SVU out of fear that it may ruin her military career

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU detectives investigate after a school nurse notices multiple injuries on a young girl. It soon becomes clear that they must stop a clinically psychopathic boy with homicidal tendencies. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A local college student is sexually assaulted, and the SVU detectives utilise every strategy they have to uncover a massive conspiracy involving the university's leading administrators. Rollins and Benson visit the victim at a psychiatric hospital, where she is undergoing electroshock therapy to erase the memories of her attack

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigators find three bodies when they arrive at the scene of an accident involving a truck full of revellers, and find a lead when one of the dead is identified as the daughter of an unpopular trade-union boss. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Carmine Giovinazzo and Hill Harper

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of shootings at a nightclub, where a bartender and two patrons were killed by a hitman, who then proceeded to kidnap someone. Hawes is stunned when the abducted woman is revealed to be Camille Jordanson, a childhood friend who has become embroiled in a messy counterfeit pill scheme and seems to have made a few enemies in the criminal underworld. Guest starring singer Ne-Yo

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Tensions are high between new partners Briscoe and Curtis as they investigate the murder of a wealthy student in a biker bar. The detectives discover the victim's father had offered him $10,000 to drop his hobby and his biker girlfriend. Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt star

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An attorney is killed shortly after deciding to file a sexual harrassment claim against his employer, and when Briscoe and Curtis investigate further, they discover both the alleged harasser and his wife have excellent motives for murder

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is shot in her sleep, and further investigation leads the detectives to a boy whose drug-addicted mother has placed him in the care of her dealer. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach

American drama following the work of the Naval Criminal Investigative Service, starring Sean Murray and Mark Harmon

Starring Lauren Holly and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A blind man unwittingly photographs evidence of a murder, leading Jethro and the team to the corpse of a petty officer who was stabbed with a knife left at the scene. programme.title: NCIS

Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray

Hard-hitting drama, starring Kelli Giddish, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Sporting drama based on Joseph Gross' novel, co-directed by and starring Richard Harris, with Romy Schneider and Kim Burfield

British fact-based drama, starring Derek Jacobi, Daniel Craig, Tilda Swinton and Adrian Scarborough

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Liverpool v Cardiff City. Action from the showpiece match at Wembley Stadium, where the winner of the first major trophy of the 2011/12 season was decided. The Reds had defeated the likes of Stoke City, Chelsea and Manchester City to reach the final and went into the match as clear favourites in their first visit to the national stadium since it was rebuilt. However, the Bluebirds, who defeated Crystal Palace on penalties in the semi-finals, had been in good form in the Championship and will have fancied their chances of producing an upset

programme.title: Live UEFA Nations League
programme.desc: Germany v Switzerland (Kick-off 7.45pm). Coverage of the Group A4 match from RheinEnergieStadion, with both sides looking for three vital points after disappointing starts to their Nations League campaigns. The reverse fixture in September saw the game end in a 1-1 draw with Silvan Widmer's goal cancelling out Ilkay Gundogan's opener. That result stretched Germany's winless run in the Nations League to six games.

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Swansea City. Highlights from Wembley Stadium in 2013, where the League Two Bantams were aiming to produce yet another cup upset. Swansea were appearing in their first major cup final and beat Chelsea in the semi-finals to reach this stage, but Bradford had stolen most of the headlines in the competition this season, belying their lowly league status to eliminate the likes of Arsenal, Aston Villa and Wigan Athletic

programme.title: EFL Highlights

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty

programme.desc: England v Denmark (Kick-off 7.45pm). Coverage of the Group A2 match at Wembley Stadium, as Gareth Southgate's side look for three vital points in their Nations League campaign. The reverse fixture saw a rather tepid game end in a goalless draw in Copenhagen, but that result does mean that England are unbeaten against Kasper Hjulmand's side in three matches, a run that stretches back to August 2005.

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: A look back at New Orleans Saints' 2009 Super Bowl triumph over Indianapolis Colts at the Sun Life Stadium in Miami, Florida. programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of New England Patriots' 2004 Super Bowl success over Philadelphia Eagles at the Alltel Stadium in Jacksonville, Florida. Victory ensured the Patriots became only the second team to win three Super Bowls in four years, all of which were won by a margin of three points

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: Revisiting Pittsburgh Steelers' 2005 Super Bowl triumph over Seattle Seahawks at Ford Field in Detroit, Michigan. The Steelers became the fourth wildcard team to win the NFL's showpiece encounter as they claimed their fifth title overall, a feat that at the time could only be matched by the San Francisco 49ers and the Dallas Cowboys
